body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41176%2E3422442%2Ep1pktt)
We're officially on the air, Peter.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260417_3_ak.VoQTjv&refcode=em20260417-41176&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41176%2E3422442%2Ep1pktt)
Katie has launched the first ad of her campaign—and it’s already running on TVs and digital platforms across California.
This ad shows people exactly who Katie is: someone who takes on Donald Trump, fights to lower costs for working families, and calls out powerful corporations that have too often made life harder for Californians.
**But getting on the air is just step one. Staying on the air is where campaigns are won or lost. So we’re asking:**
**[Can you chip in $5 or whatever makes sense to you today to keep our ad on air?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260417_3_ak.VoQTjv&refcode=em20260417-41176&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41176%2E3422442%2Ep1pktt)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260417_3_ak.VoQTjv&refcode=em20260417-41176&t=5&akid=41176%2E3422442%2Ep1pktt)
Running ads in a state this large takes serious resources, and our billionaire opponent has already spent over _$120 million_ of his own money on his campaign.
If we want our message to break through the crowded airwaves, we have to keep our ad on screens across California.
Every extra day this ad runs means reaching more voters and making sure they hear from Katie.
**[Grassroots support got us here—and keeping this ad live is what will carry our campaign even further. Peter, will you rush $5 to keep our ad live and reach as many voters as we can across California?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260417_3_ak.VoQTjv&refcode=em20260417-41176&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=41176%2E3422442%2Ep1pktt)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260417_3_ak.VoQTjv&refcode=em20260417-41176&t=25&akid=41176%2E3422442%2Ep1pktt)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260417-41176&amounts=&t=26&refcode2=41176_3422442_p1pktt&akid=41176%2E3422442%2Ep1pktt)**
---

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41176&t=28&akid=41176%2E3422442%2Ep1pktt)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026

name: April Christenson
subject: Did you see our last email?
body:
Peter,
One week from today, one lucky winner (it could be you!) will have the chance to win a once-in-a-lifetime vacation of their choice: a Coastal Cabo Oceanfront Escape, a Jackson Hole Winter Adventure, or Glamping in the Grand Canyon. When you purchase a raffle ticket today for just $100 you are supporting OLCV's important protecting Oregon's natural legacy, electing pro-environment candidates to office, and holding our elected leaders accountable - and you might just win the vacation of your dreams!
Buy your raffle ticket [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/2ced078932954976aa791014bb7f88a3]
The price of one raffle ticket - $100 - is all we need to recruit 3 volunteers to get out the vote for OLCV-endorsed candidates this election year. We're all in this together - so whether you win or not, we all win when you support our work.
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/April%27s%20Signature.png]
April Christenson (she/her)
OLCV Development Director
P.S.: The winner will be announced at OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment on Friday, April 24th. Get your tickets here so that you celebrate with us when you win! [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/a809178051b511ea91bae14d12592328]
https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/2ced078932954976aa791014bb7f88a3 [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/2ced078932954976aa791014bb7f88a3]
Hi Peter,
What if your next vacation could also help power climate action here in Oregon?
With OLCV’s Annual Celebration raffle, that’s exactly what your $100 ticket does. You’ll be entered to win a choose-your-own-adventure dream getaway, and whether or not you win, your ticket will help us do something powerful: recruit and mobilize volunteers to protect Oregon’s environment. In fact, one ticket can help us recruit up to three volunteers to take action for climate and conservation. [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/2ced078932954976aa791014bb7f88a3]
Here’s what you could win:
🌴 Coastal Cabo Oceanfront Escape ( click here to see more! [https://youtu.be/8feUF78fa7s] )
A 4-night stay for two at a luxury beachfront resort in Cabo San Lucas: think infinity pools, ocean views, and total relaxation.
🏔️ Jackson Hole Winter Adventure ( click here to see more! [https://youtu.be/YkLQx7DhD6M] )
A 3-night alpine getaway with lift tickets, breathtaking mountain scenery, and your choice of a wildlife sleigh ride or distillery experience.
🌌 Grand Canyon Luxury Glamping ( click here to see more! [https://youtu.be/ldXeaK1CK2I] )
A 3-night stay in a panoramic Sky Dome near the Grand Canyon, complete with stargazing, live music, and unforgettable desert sunsets.
Buy your raffle ticket [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/2ced078932954976aa791014bb7f88a3]
No matter which trip you’d choose, every ticket purchased fuels OLCV’s work to fight climate change, protect Oregon’s natural places, and build a stronger environmental movement.
So yes, you might find yourself sipping a margarita in Cabo, skiing fresh powder in Jackson Hole, or stargazing at the Grand Canyon...
But even if you don’t, your $100 will still go a long way in helping us organize, advocate, and win for Oregon’s future.
Tickets are $100 and limited. Get yours now! [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/2ced078932954976aa791014bb7f88a3]
Thank you for being part of this work. And good luck, you just might be packing your bags soon!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: The winner will be announced at OLCV’s Annual Celebration for the Environment on Friday, April 24th. Get your tickets here so that you celebrate with us when you win! [https://event.auctria.com/9bac5df8-723f-4cab-b467-c43ae5d9b9df/a809178051b511ea91bae14d12592328]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/63784F716E2B2B477144525067766C6C61794E6C7A6355736C6B4E6B4243724F6C36365666446A75386D6570595755556548443734792B44574A4C6161447074/editor_images/Screen%20Shot%202026-04-10%20at%2010.24.13%20AM.png]
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/ReVeUSnqh0mAa9rjhFdl7A2?unsubscribedata=kyweFEtqsRHmCj209DPRjDrm0hjU9Calk5gPIx4YTmEEQ3TZlbn%2F8HXuhn4F1BiFCKDgkhxFzDDAqV26110s7t8W4eYaPyHxKxc4BxZQdVpCan%2FSjEuyjpK1wEzzPBmrA8PXRPEIDknFN2w%2B4exrTgUPGeFMyBi%2BXKh%2FVvvGu6MyYCC%2F%2FfreUX0kcx9eAAv9wxw1QU1hJDbvVgeXtFl85nU6wLo7afk9MMJvW4YPog0ZZkPxadPt5%2BvfqXXwRGW1cCqVlq9jtc3OvthnHh7nNEgBGOJ4W4Jf7vNuuewtnHOHERZ7d7d2MmkmuCXLtCozjILJhm%2BQIAolPh1oWuHEUvYXoySHdktOcpN4hSbGceRH7EihOIya6mGZ%2BCmENDD57Ul9Hy%2B0hC9868v87YWdEOd%2FMs65fPZv%2FqBsbKwq3B8%3D .

[] [] [] [] [] Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: Alice was sold until someone stepped in
body:
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxUaTSAknUjHuciG2i0_dOHgEhVkLaZ2bOH1pQGYX4_2rsnLEq7QnMRSUdEP30toSMHYKwUq-fd7vKPCw8x4GpDb_lYIQZRlUciVQ
View in browser
A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
Sound of FreedomShe was rescued. Many are still waiting. You can help find them. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxWXPjhynHr12Dl_59HdRHseaFEsaboKUq7yljjtvcaK-cqZz18LJNn9KFQNtMJsRlYRcsencSO4gJ4qcegg1_HKuPYoqae_F5yWw

GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE

Friend,

A little girl sat alone in the dark.

Lured online by someone pretending to care and taken from her home.

Kidnapped and hidden away in a remote cabin, where she was abused, and sold online.

And passed from one man to another.

Her name is Alice.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxY4-DvgcUjR-tiDP7TWni1B3WWHvZm7a6-vObtaTwd6B9scCgXRxf4PtGdk3X2nYxSLmDDKusYYjGJihTwMMxDDj40SA9_JAF0Ow
Rescue A Child Now

And this is the part most people never hear.

She was found. An investigator in Florida traced her trafficker’s username. He saw a connection others missed and contacted the FBI.

Agents followed the digital trail, tracing the trafficker’s IP address.

They moved in, raided the location and rescued her.

Alive.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxasux8xCH3Lsmv4KxieTMG7DO0k0xiTt9Bwnf8YBLyqGLthALk0PgdPIC0LITDVSReA0LJGfMc6f4Kxtv1i8llTyvkRQPY-A8ATA

Her trafficker now faces 20 years to life in prison.

This is what happens when someone goes looking.
This is what happens when the right tools are in place.

But there are still so many children who have not been found yet.

Still waiting.
Still trapped.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxc4E_fYg_D6n08v7bHiomkPX4nMA5Q3Y6pKmwDXLERIZZnmb5p0pyZk_uUySgOcc1egr3r6u38yXPfoMUBSso9L-lHdQMYkLpZCA
Rescue A Child Now

And that is why the Sound of Freedom Foundation exists.

Friend, if this is your first time hearing about us, the Sound of Freedom Foundation’s mission is clear:

To stop the sale of God’s children.

The foundation extends the reach of the Sound of Freedom film, bringing awareness to the reality of child trafficking and taking action to stop it.

Our vision is simple:

A world where every child is safe and free.

We work with partners to prevent exploitation before it begins, support rescue operations, and equip investigators. Our partners walk with survivors as they heal and rebuild their lives.

Because rescue is only the beginning. And right now, there is an urgent need.

We are launching Operation Search and Rescue, a mission to connect investigators and agents, identify traffickers, and build criminal evidence.

We will support real rescue operations using tools like digital tracking and face recognition.

This is how children are found and how traffickers are stopped.
And today, you can be part of it.

And right now, your donation will be matched, dollar for dollar.

A concerned Child Defense Organization has approveda $10,000 MATCHING GRANT.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxeyEwWxdJFNSj82T3a55jf0YVx1n7P0uXipu4yr5C6-y5AkoG4yap1NM1nRzpraOV3ljlrPaI5M48HHy-q0Fi-xkiRsMI3xfjd0g

Every dollar you give will be doubled.

$25 Gift Doubles to $50
$50 Gift Doubles to $100
$100 Gift Doubles to $200
$250 Gift Doubles to $500
$500 Gift Doubles to $1,000

Your gift goes twice as far to help find and rescue children.

This is God multiplying love.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxgOdTXGwKv7Bl0iXQdlJ8O9X1HOqjdhaR7OZIj1uB_NkgjpigxGh_Wy6-9pqm37N6n_8nGAjeu8PCgwh786Cmenx__0dSlJhzc0Q

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxiBKQyxq2FAKVAsBurxSHo5N9fsyi_pneAiXFjQJrH_ysa9mAR2kgSg3ovparl-8Q5FdcwGUtUOl06mBVv0FVUO4G_-dtNjqExwQ

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxjA9L891ZzCp6RKHRXdBSVl9-rjzqXTkY-1tQnT4ReB0edkK9EEmEHI2_1DyCrL9oGEM8bm2UYnaGt3mn4djavfuQFbeuJBOyAfg
Your donation of $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can give today can have twice the impact, and double the chance to bring a child home.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxl0N6AJj1Ffka2MM-L9rMtEED86i8E3uP1XCu9oH7FSEWp8RvAKvbWlvNxYXv8gN8S3fM4VLJ6ShId20CJFRNzi705IUYhTxrNUQ
Double My Impact Now

Jesus said, “Whoever welcomes one little child like this in my name welcomes me.” (Matthew 18:5)

Today you can be that welcome.
You can enable the search and help the rescue mission to bring a child home.

Please give as generously as you can while your gift is matched.

And please pray for Alice, and for the children still waiting.
And for the day when every child is safe and free.

Because God’s children are not for sale.

With gratitude and prayer,

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxmzB7G54hWshNyceAIXCZG9hXxqfqQ6Ryd7V6sy9kwwH7xRIK9gN_Jg-X1q-RVjtSNJtbCHQS2-HHU3PdlAHsoe2v4YtNeHAKW8Q

Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NTB9AAwAAAAAABrtqPxnLveIrkyoj8B9PbAZ1bKYyL7xbQuC7zXwH5AodzRC6NmCrVti-3KYAaVQKPm9sEckt2EBQmsULibfLigDP761BmAKs76lNo-UCQ
Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation

6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

name: Danielle Bethell for Governor
subject: What Last Night Showed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Danielle Bethell PAC 20220 [Preferences](https://daniellebethell
body:
Did you catch the debate? You don’t want to miss it.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,Last night's debate in Hillsboro put the focus where it belongs; on the issues Oregonians are dealing with every day.Cost of living. Public safety. Housing. Systems that aren't working the way they should.Those are the questions that came up, and they're the same ones I hear traveling across the state.I was glad to be on that stage answering them. Because this isn't something I'm stepping into for the first time. As a county commissioner, I'm already doing this work, expanding mental health and addiction services, addressing homelessness, managing budgets, and making decisions that affect people's day-to-day lives.That experience makes a difference in my ability to govern.It shapes how I approach these issues, not as talking points, but as systems that need to work.That's what I focused on last night.There are different approaches in this race. Some talk about the problems. Others are coming at it from outside government.I've spent years inside these systems, building programs, fixing gaps, and delivering results.That's the difference I bring.If you didn't have a chance to watch, [you can see the full debate here](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-y/).We're heading into the final stretch of this race.If you believe Oregon needs leadership grounded in real experience and focused on results, [I'm asking for your support.](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-j/) Danielle Bethell
Republican for Governor
Marion County Commissioner**P.S.** I'll keep showing up, answering questions, and earning support the right way. [I appreciate everyone who's been part of that effort.](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-t/) [Donate Today](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-i/) [Visit My Website](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-d/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-h/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-k/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-x/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-m/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-c/) | [ Tweet ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-q/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail19.com/t/y-li-ahtyhkk-hhlrhljhit-a/) | [ Forward ](https://daniellebethell.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-hhlrhljhit-E19159AE-ahtyhkk-l-f)

name: MassGOP
subject: CONVENTION 7 DAYS TO GO: FAQs
body:
What you need to know heading into the 2026 Convention...
| | | | |
---
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rL8mNZ9eqrLQ8PXb-dqVn8EHQC7LSXi3XsrlkUvks2Morefr6c0A4-pQFgFq1Iprat8Pvb3sahIdMgY9LLOIwJ8FLhgb2uMVdZj0EmfTwgZb_p8TxIxI1A5uAYTJcI1CEQPFJv9Jmlc_JQpqFt2LFU7YKLxFbyIJhSNgI0SiFo8fOQYMSlG8ei7B8_BSMU4AlKAydDtNtcU=&c=VquThb_nZSFrbNCIeGIiVskH-caXOn2n6uZnWXmuOhDm0wa4a1U_GQ==&ch=8or737Zfh6JQQWbmync80fnbmS3REsyT45mFSqIFxh35V4GkFJcqww==)
---
# FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
---
When and where is the Convention? The Convention will be held on Saturday, April 25, 2026 at the DCU Center in Worcester, Massachusetts.
What time is check-in? Registration will be open from 8:00 AM to 10:00 AM. The Convention will gavel in promptly at 9:00 AM. Please note: delegates may not enter or exit the facility after 10:00 AM, as ballot preparation will begin.
What should I do when I arrive? Enter through the main entrance, proceed through security screening, then check in to confirm your delegate status and receive your credentials.
What is the DCU bag policy? Guests may bring in small purses/wristlets with a maximum size of 8x10 inches. Diaper bags, medical bags, and associated supplies such as breast pumps are also allowed but will be subject to a security check prior to entry. All other bags larger than 8" x 10" will not be permitted inside the venue.
Are there any prohibited items? Prohibited items include items which could be used as a weapon, unlawful substances, bottles or cans, helium balloons, laser pens, non-retractable/collapsible umbrellas, backpacks, knapsacks, luggage, coolers, parcels, briefcases, tablets and like articles.
Is there a registration fee? Yes. The delegate registration fee is $200. We strongly encourage paying in advance to expedite check-in on Convention day: [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/2026delegatefee](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rL8mNZ9eqrLQ8PXb-dqVn8EHQC7LSXi3XsrlkUvks2Morefr6c0A4yogRdHdNkH6h-gEQxtC9RoFynfUS_LaZSem5N7qBn3YaJajoN-E10dBhG2p56TT_lS7bfJmvXUH9RxJOQkUCH5ARcz83820ibfcwKzO_PSDSLIgH68R3py7Pf6AcBNWtR4tnvPGX3WQE2ssZhL3l06BmAlkjRsIIQ==&c=VquThb_nZSFrbNCIeGIiVskH-caXOn2n6uZnWXmuOhDm0wa4a1U_GQ==&ch=8or737Zfh6JQQWbmync80fnbmS3REsyT45mFSqIFxh35V4GkFJcqww==)
---
| [IF YOU HAVEN'T ALREADY - PAY YOUR DELEGATE FEE](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rL8mNZ9eqrLQ8PXb-dqVn8EHQC7LSXi3XsrlkUvks2Morefr6c0A4yogRdHdNkH6h-gEQxtC9RoFynfUS_LaZSem5N7qBn3YaJajoN-E10dBhG2p56TT_lS7bfJmvXUH9RxJOQkUCH5ARcz83820ibfcwKzO_PSDSLIgH68R3py7Pf6AcBNWtR4tnvPGX3WQ4lcKi3Je4ZOtJuHPnAkCjQ==&c=VquThb_nZSFrbNCIeGIiVskH-caXOn2n6uZnWXmuOhDm0wa4a1U_GQ==&ch=8or737Zfh6JQQWbmync80fnbmS3REsyT45mFSqIFxh35V4GkFJcqww==)
---
Can I bring guests who are not delegates? Yes. Non-delegate guests may attend for a reduced registration fee of $100. However, only credentialed delegates may sit on the convention floor and vote. Guests will be seated in designated spectator areas. [https://secure.winred.com/massachusetts-gop/2026guestfee](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rL8mNZ9eqrLQ8PXb-dqVn8EHQC7LSXi3XsrlkUvks2Morefr6c0A48_r2AWSJ2QwKyBpTuHb6b2TbIVPtsbee6DTQ7bs5_hqDHsZ1YlEONOpsMcx9iMiDA8jFDogYNGzQf5T7djhV5qO0Ike4iIhAWAuZiwUmlfD5kxmZibNkrxiXwO47vDT14Cnnakbxxse-uuVppoArWE=&c=VquThb_nZSFrbNCIeGIiVskH-caXOn2n6uZnWXmuOhDm0wa4a1U_GQ==&ch=8or737Zfh6JQQWbmync80fnbmS3REsyT45mFSqIFxh35V4GkFJcqww==)
---
| [PURCHASE A GUEST PASS](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rL8mNZ9eqrLQ8PXb-dqVn8EHQC7LSXi3XsrlkUvks2Morefr6c0A48_r2AWSJ2QwKyBpTuHb6b2TbIVPtsbee6DTQ7bs5_hqDHsZ1YlEONOpsMcx9iMiDA8jFDogYNGzQf5T7djhV5qO0Ike4iIhAWAuZiwUmlfD5kxmZibNkrxiXwO47vDT17vMUB4hkGGujUnSsos0s6w=&c=VquThb_nZSFrbNCIeGIiVskH-caXOn2n6uZnWXmuOhDm0wa4a1U_GQ==&ch=8or737Zfh6JQQWbmync80fnbmS3REsyT45mFSqIFxh35V4GkFJcqww==)
---
How does seating work on the convention floor? Delegates are seated by State Senate District. Your credentials will indicate your assigned seating section--please locate your section and take your seat upon arrival.
How does voting work at the Convention? For contested races, voting is conducted by tally within each State Senate District. Delegates will approach the tally collector and indicate their vote when their name is called. If no candidate receives a majority on the first ballot, additional ballots will be conducted until a majority is achieved.
Can someone vote on my behalf (proxy voting)? No. Proxy voting is not permitted. You must be present, credentialed, and on the convention floor by 10:00 AM in order to vote.
What if I have a religious conflict with Saturday voting? The Convention rules allow for religious accommodations. Delegates who cannot be present due to religious observance may request an absentee ballot in advance. This must be arranged ahead of time--please contact your State Committee member as soon as possible: [https://massgop.com/our-party/committee/](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rL8mNZ9eqrLQ8PXb-dqVn8EHQC7LSXi3XsrlkUvks2Morefr6c0A40pL0bs8w-WeAGcMwY7bJjP-pGmPMJnmQpZMLQesd2c5A-vHB5rCUlmYAHADxxPJ3Ct_AiN0JFWWbiwBQWQE-kKtRvebcCs3Xcrd3hSveGBfDY2MkvrgDAg_3OPEspWy3w==&c=VquThb_nZSFrbNCIeGIiVskH-caXOn2n6uZnWXmuOhDm0wa4a1U_GQ==&ch=8or737Zfh6JQQWbmync80fnbmS3REsyT45mFSqIFxh35V4GkFJcqww==)

clean_body: What you need to know heading into the 2026 Convention... | | | | | | | == FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS When and where is the Convention? The Convention will be held on Saturday, April 25, 2026 at the DCU Center in Worcester, Massachusetts. What time is check-in? Registration will be open from 8:00 AM to 10:00 AM. The Convention will gavel in promptly at 9:00 AM. Please note: delegates may not enter or exit the facility after 10:00 AM, as ballot preparation will begin. What should I do when I arrive? Enter through the main entrance, proceed through security screening, then check in to confirm your delegate status and receive your credentials. What is the DCU bag policy? Guests may bring in small purses/wristlets with a maximum size of 8x10 inches. Diaper bags, medical bags, and associated supplies such as breast pumps are also allowed but will be subject to a security check prior to entry. All other bags larger than 8" x 10" will not be permitted inside the venue. Are there any prohibited items? Prohibited items include items which could be used as a weapon, unlawful substances, bottles or cans, helium balloons, laser pens, non-retractable/collapsible umbrellas, backpacks, knapsacks, luggage, coolers, parcels, briefcases, tablets and like articles. Is there a registration fee? Yes. The delegate registration fee is $200. We strongly encourage paying in advance to expedite check-in on Convention day: == | == Can I bring guests who are not delegates? Yes. Non-delegate guests may attend for a reduced registration fee of $100. However, only credentialed delegates may sit on the convention floor and vote. Guests will be seated in designated spectator areas. == | == How does seating work on the convention floor? Delegates are seated by State Senate District. Your credentials will indicate your assigned seating section--please locate your section and take your seat upon arrival. How does voting work at the Convention? For contested races, voting is conducted by tally within each State Senate District. Delegates will approach the tally collector and indicate their vote when their name is called. If no candidate receives a majority on the first ballot, additional ballots will be conducted until a majority is achieved. Can someone vote on my behalf (proxy voting)? No. Proxy voting is not permitted. You must be present, credentialed, and on the convention floor by 10:00 AM in order to vote. What if I have a religious conflict with Saturday voting? The Convention rules allow for religious accommodations. Delegates who cannot be present due to religious observance may request an absentee ballot in advance. This must be arranged ahead of time--please contact your State Committee member as soon as possible: == I'm driving. Where should I park? While the DCU Center does not own or operate any parking, they work closely with the garages and parking lots nearest to provide guests with several convenient options. Visit for more info. P.S. Want to get more involved? We're always looking for volunteers to help make Convention day run smoothly, from check-in support to floor operations. If you're interested in volunteering, please sign up here: | == | | FRIDAY NIGHT FUN APRIL 24 CONVENTION EVE | WORCESTER, MA | RED WHITE & UNITE with MassGOP & John Deaton Skip the Saturday morning lines and pick up your credentials early! Then off to Candidate parties... | | | CONVENTION DAY SATURDAY APRIL 25 DCU CENTER | WORCESTER, MA | 8:00 AM - 10:00 AM: Registration Open 9:00 AM: Gavel Down 10:00 AM: Doors Close -- Delegates Must Be in Building to Vote Call to Order Invocation Pledge of Allegiance National Anthem Appointment of Honorary Chairman Appointment of Temporary Secretary Report of the Convention Committees Election of Permanent Secretary Election of Presiding Convention Chairman Nominating and Balloting for Candidates to Be Endorsed for the Following Offices: U.S. Senate Treasurer Attorney General Lt. name: Byron Donalds
subject: I'm not going to waste your time like the rest of the messages.
body:
Just one question from me that needs your immediate response:

---
| | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6761gcfjhpcev0jibuq9nj8pt20jup7sfn2icc8_rp22sh2s8i6epr3cli60p71cjh2bs)
---
| | | | | I know how valuable your time is, and I'm not here to waste it like the rest.

It's Trump-endorsed MAGA patriot Byron Donalds, and I just have one question, that's it.

President Trump released one of the most crucial statements of his second term:

**THE SAVE AMERICA ACT!

1\. ALL VOTERS MUST SHOW VOTER I.D. (IDENTIFICATION!).

2\. ALL VOTERS MUST SHOW PROOF OF CITIZENSHIP IN ORDER TO VOTE.

3\. NO MAIL-IN BALLOTS (EXCEPT FOR ILLNESS, DISABILITY, MILITARY, OR TRAVEL!).

4\. NO MEN IN WOMEN'S SPORTS.

5\. NO TRANSGENDER MUTILATION SURGERY FOR CHILDREN.**

President Trump

Do you agree with everything you just read?

If so, I need your immediate response.

_**[This is the most CRUCIAL part of President Trump's agenda, and it is hanging in the balance, as you read this.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zckojtc1i73h891ri0ianffoopmk3ltv1j546d6g_rp22sh2s8i6epr3cli60p71cjh2bs "This is the most CRUCIAL part of President Trump’s agenda, and it is hanging in the balance, as you read this.")**_

If MAGA comes up short here, there will be SEVERE consequences.

I'm fighting around the clock to help MAGA pass this, and the attacks have NEVER been more threatening than now.

All because I'm running for Governor in Florida with one goal in mind: **KEEP MAGA STRONG.**

Elections are right around the corner, and seats will be handed over to Democrats on a SILVER PLATTER if the SAVE Act isn't passed.

If you SUPPORT this, please let me know immediately.

I need to know who MAGA can count on.
---
| | [RESPOND HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjot5r5s8pn23ju74gv9a41ja0u9c2hh17edcs0_rp22sh2s8i6epr3cli60p71cjh2bs)
---
| | | The SAVE America Act will be the straw that breaks the Democrats' age-old election scheme.

They know it, and you know it.

This is why Democrats are fighting around the clock to make sure the SAVE America Act is NOT passed.

As of right now, here's the unfortunate truth: **MAGA is outnumbered.**

If we fail to act, we can kiss the 2026 elections goodbye and every aspect of the MAGA.

That's why I'm not here to waste your time. This petition is the LARGEST mobilization in MAGA history.

I need **EVERY. SINGLE. MAGA. PATRIOT.**

This can't wait; Without the SAVE America Act, everything President Trump and MAGA have accomplished will VANISH.

Don't let that happen.

I need to know where you stand, and I'll be sharing responses with President Trump.

---

---

Thank you for all that you do,

Byron Donalds

body:
Things are about to get really bad. Clarence Thomas just announced that progressivism is an "existential threat" to this country's founding principles. That the belief that the government should serve
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pwFLxOy9iHsoC46VHBfkJq5gWMJKHuQtNUSojVk6VTPKY8L2MRZFFtB8lYJWx_dp6SGGTTgD5Ddl1extqMdO2pRmbBc4AsVAv72d3tQz6b0Cx3kbqZWS1vYdIqQS6xuMRxjBeRCxjOjXawL1IYNd0EgrCiyaZsSNOY3iZ7BrPZYac9cfCLSsY2xchy4_EFwLmb-Rqm9uywbPPeFfW4vpL6ecEyn3B0wpZkVi1yQhvqM=&c=HR3JgCMEMSXWIflq_Nk13-c840KzRSJd70U7fSU6qKW4TDKJSl5h5Q==&ch=mZ-7gRoC1-PNlw2ByCGeBo-hYCPz7_R61y4T1ukM2584J9kLWfGB1g==)

|
Peter,
Yesterday, a sitting Supreme Court Justice declared your values a threat to America in a televised speech.
Clarence Thomas stood at the University of Texas and announced that progressivism is an "existential threat" to this country's founding principles. That the belief that the government should serve the people, not just the elite, requires "subservience and weakness."
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pwFLxOy9iHsoC46VHBfkJq5gWMJKHuQtNUSojVk6VTPKY8L2MRZFFtB8lYJWx_dp6SGGTTgD5Ddl1extqMdO2pRmbBc4AsVAv72d3tQz6b0Cx3kbqZWS1vYdIqQS6xuMRxjBeRCxjOjXawL1IYNd0EgrCiyaZsSNOY3iZ7BrPZYac9cfCLSsY2xchy4_EFwLmb-Rqm9uywbPPeFfW4vpL0V44PkgsUrQieZEPhWBOcU=&c=HR3JgCMEMSXWIflq_Nk13-c840KzRSJd70U7fSU6qKW4TDKJSl5h5Q==&ch=mZ-7gRoC1-PNlw2ByCGeBo-hYCPz7_R61y4T1ukM2584J9kLWfGB1g==)
---

This is an unprecedented partisan attack by a sitting Supreme Court Justice.
Now more than ever, it's clear the U.S. Supreme Court needs serious reform. It's packed with MAGA radicals, drowning in corruption, and continuously issues nakedly partisan rulings while hiding behind the shadow docket.
We've had enough.
Defend Our Courts isn't taking this attack on our values lightly, and we'll have more details to share soon.
But we have one more race to win first.
On May 19, Democrats have a real shot at flipping two seats on the Georgia Supreme Court. If Dems win these two seats, they'll have an opening to completely flip control of the court in 2028, just months before for the next presidential race.
A coalition of pro-democracy groups is throwing everything at these races, and after our victories in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin, they've turned to us to help close the gap when they need it most.
Thomas just showed you exactly what we're up against. MAGA judges aren't just ruling against us. They're coming after democracy itself. Now we have a chance to knock two of them off the Georgia Supreme Court. We just need your support:

That the belief that the government should serve | | | | | == | Peter, Yesterday, a sitting Supreme Court Justice declared your values a threat to America in a televised speech. Clarence Thomas stood at the University of Texas and announced that progressivism is an "existential threat" to this country's founding principles. That the belief that the government should serve the people, not just the elite, requires "subservience and weakness." | == This is an unprecedented partisan attack by a sitting Supreme Court Justice. Now more than ever, it's clear the U.S. Supreme Court needs serious reform. It's packed with MAGA radicals, drowning in corruption, and continuously issues nakedly partisan rulings while hiding behind the shadow docket. We've had enough. Defend Our Courts isn't taking this attack on our values lightly, and we'll have more details to share soon. But we have one more race to win first. On May 19, Democrats have a real shot at flipping two seats on the Georgia Supreme Court. name: J. Davis
subject: A black man wasn't supposed to win, now MAGA's overturning it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jamie Davis for U
body:
A wrongfully incarcerated survivor who fought for his own freedom and exoneration was elected to become the Clerk of Criminal Court in New Orleans.
| | | | James "Jamie" Davis is a third-generation row-crop farmer from Tensas Parish and the Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate running to build a more affordable Louisiana.Thank you for your crucial support for Jamie. However [if you'd like to unsubscribe,](https://audience.constantcontact.com/preferences/unsubscribe?m=00124CuHbA0hJrxvPabazzyUg==&c=c11d7d34-3777-11f1-8d98-02420a320003&ca=42ec2e85-8000-4615-92b8-436604b1742f) you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.
---
| | [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A5YYu3lXgLicvlNqXQLbLG8APqGLN0BaFtIgeTBUBrso0zlIcKj5Cw-wm3Gn9Zo19XIpIIqIFb8_cvkVYbSXjmt05W5bnapPyYRFie7DKY9AaYF8F-5ncjKbgoSJvUgEZDtC433EYVlNLFBprD9d_5b31JUUD07lMzwEmCryB3k3auOQE8bgNFt27v5uauhJ-vZMjX64zey4_0jy1SntxN_z9tmllA7E&c=IAwYrIBKrObcJ3nMbyEOW6NljHYgmAyspqoCVGlDsIHSe-0QBJZIEA==&ch=kmfSx2K4laVLN4821SO5nWPeEWUzfRdVJtmybxtByYq46IdsYr5mJA==)
---
Peter, They aren't even trying to hide it anymore.
Right now, Republican legislators in Louisiana are rushing a bill to block a duly elected man from taking office before he's even sworn in.
That man is Calvin Duncan.
Calvin isn't a career politician. He's a black man and a wrongfully incarcerated survivor who fought for his own freedom and exoneration and then dedicated his life to reforming that broken system. He ran for Clerk of Criminal Court in New Orleans because he knows from firsthand experience what happens inside a corrupt courthouse.
And he won.
---
| [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A5YYu3lXgLicvlNqXQLbLG8APqGLN0BaFtIgeTBUBrso0zlIcKj5Cw-wm3Gn9Zo19XIpIIqIFb8_cvkVYbSXjmt05W5bnapPyYRFie7DKY9AaYF8F-5ncjKbgoSJvUgEZDtC433EYVlNLFBprD9d_5b31JUUD07lMzwEmCryB3k3auOQE8bgNFt27v5uauhJ-vZMjX64zeyd9iBV9gytj9-vdPc5nzIN&c=IAwYrIBKrObcJ3nMbyEOW6NljHYgmAyspqoCVGlDsIHSe-0QBJZIEA==&ch=kmfSx2K4laVLN4821SO5nWPeEWUzfRdVJtmybxtByYq46IdsYr5mJA==)
---
Now the GOP are working to erase his seat altogether, all because voters chose someone who threatens the status quo.
Let's call this what it is: an attack on democracy and a deliberate effort to protect a system that long profited from mass incarceration.
Louisiana has one of the highest incarceration rates in the country. We know the history: Jim Crow juries, unequal justice, and a system that exploits incarcerated people for pennies an hour. And when voters demanded change, Republicans decided to use the state legislature in Baton Rouge to block progress in New Orleans.
My name is Jamie Davis, if MAGA didn't like Calvin, they're going to hate me. I'm the Democrat running for the United States Senate in Louisiana because I believe that people who know the brokenness of this system need a seat at the table.
Voters who stand for equity and justice will show up in force this election -- and the more extreme they get, the stronger the backlash will be.
[Louisiana has never elected a black person to the US Senate or for that matter to any statewide office. Together we can make history, flip this seat, and reclaim the US Senate for Democrats this Fall. So please, can you make a donation of $25, $10, or even just $5 to help us win this critical fight?](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A5YYu3lXgLicvlNqXQLbLG8APqGLN0BaFtIgeTBUBrso0zlIcKj5Cw-wm3Gn9Zo1uP8P6Wq9N06-C0MWI8s5g6GlXk8-RsE0sQOcBeZ7RexeF6J8SircAqJ6QrWeGQi89Sz3NlcDQlVZNbIhnHzz0xpL1PFrHdFVjGzvKS9HjNCYdeyUqdwW-lsgUbkTfrHbjPdEDt6ZKiz-wQEOnvvQfMklmaxCHF82quknIJsNlL4=&c=IAwYrIBKrObcJ3nMbyEOW6NljHYgmAyspqoCVGlDsIHSe-0QBJZIEA==&ch=kmfSx2K4laVLN4821SO5nWPeEWUzfRdVJtmybxtByYq46IdsYr5mJA==)

clean_body: A wrongfully incarcerated survivor who fought for his own freedom and exoneration was elected to become the Clerk of Criminal Court in New Orleans. | | | | James "Jamie" Davis is a third-generation row-crop farmer from Tensas Parish and the Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate running to build a more affordable Louisiana.Thank you for your crucial support for Jamie. However you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email. | | == Peter, They aren't even trying to hide it anymore. Right now, Republican legislators in Louisiana are rushing a bill to block a duly elected man from taking office before he's even sworn in. That man is Calvin Duncan. Calvin isn't a career politician. He's a black man and a wrongfully incarcerated survivor who fought for his own freedom and exoneration and then dedicated his life to reforming that broken system. He ran for Clerk of Criminal Court in New Orleans because he knows from firsthand experience what happens inside a corrupt courthouse. And he won. | == Now the GOP are working to erase his seat altogether, all because voters chose someone who threatens the status quo. Let's call this what it is: an attack on democracy and a deliberate effort to protect a system that long profited from mass incarceration. Louisiana has one of the highest incarceration rates in the country. We know the history: Jim Crow juries, unequal justice, and a system that exploits incarcerated people for pennies an hour. And when voters demanded change, Republicans decided to use the state legislature in Baton Rouge to block progress in New Orleans. My name is Jamie Davis, if MAGA didn't like Calvin, they're going to hate me. I'm the Democrat running for the United States Senate in Louisiana because I believe that people who know the brokenness of this system need a seat at the table. Voters who stand for equity and justice will show up in force this election -- and the more extreme they get, the stronger the backlash will be. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Let's take a stand. name: The Flyover
subject: Iran Opens Strait, Missing Scientists Mystery, and Attacking the Bride
body:
Iran declared the [Strait of Hormuz "completely open"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuxCAUBU-DOyzABpuCIo27TZvSwvBZ_wjDCsham9NHTo6Q-knzNPNxW28WI6b7uz3AtJDXBGeN0BqUFYtN-QGp1lYstgNrxXSvDlfBhKJspHxevcX4WsfOmwAgYOjA8GlSkinNdbcb6weQQXKulZw37oQOfA5CSQFaK791aC4aG_nMGZsH3XM_SC1Bjlo6t22BjAw8tlz6z4yp7RDiKz-h9C4fXTR7a49KhjciFiKW8zx7lzZ3jUQsF5qIhY1ELHwiYrmc6GkL3XM5vr7pnxrFWixEGmGzKSfqwFYIWKDf2xG7YvzjxBixqomM7H5YjL_v7V_Jnkb8BAAA__8lkIBF) to commercial shipping on Friday as President Trump said a deal to end the US-Israeli war on Iran was "very close," sending oil prices tumbling 12% and U.S. stocks soaring.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuK6zAYBOCnkbsE3S-FigMhXU67pZGl3_G_yJKRRELefvG-wnYDM3zFfD3mR8CM5fk_7ODHWucC755hDGgztlDqAaX30QKOHXvH8uwRZ065vlB5YXZOAfNnllPyKwAHMYFnxmhFtWNu2ryW0azGLkZaCTEtKjpldFKOcaVWKSf0p0Yls4xSK9yVJaGcAiWdinFZViIpJBy1Xb8rlrHBmj_1Be0a6z5lv41xdCL-EX4n_H60OiAOSPUYWEs_R2cj7oGIG5OGEq7jGa3linDdGRG3qfl0vDFn7NoQSZ97wPzrjz-d8vL8JwAA__8EJ3MD) | |
# Saturday, April 18, 2026
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1775, [Paul Revere and William Dawes](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1q8zAUxvGrkbcYfVrRoOGFl2zpWugiZOvYPkWWgnUS47sv6S10fR74Df_Pe7hHzFiWj7iBp7mGAkfLQAR7wD2W-oDSGu0RacPWsCxtwiC5HC5cX8Q1pIj5DLpLfgaQoDrwwtrB8MEJ161-sCaNUQidtJJJc2vTzDk3Lo5gXBw69G-Na3EVnF-V60VSxhkw2plpGseZaQ4Jqe79d8VCK8z5rC_Y-6luXfYr0aMx9Y_JG5O34zj6sz7pOcL7fy-RppWp24up_6t9LvarnOGs3e7T48CcsQ2Wab5sEfMvSX_q8PLyJwAA__-TQnIN) rode out from Boston on their famous ride, alerting Colonial leaders about British soldiers planning a mission to remove arms and supplies from the countryside.

We report today on a new study about end-of-life situations in which people [share certain common visions](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDEOnDAQRU9jOq_swSxQuEhDt2lTIhuPYSKDkT27K24fkRwh9dN_-nq_XvPLUaJj_el2tBzzfOC3JmTGMlNxRz7xqJWLI96pVjrWutAMCp5SGamHOThK12yaYCMiYNug1X3_7NRz1GOz2Rh17CGO2PkWoA_BRO9HD6hCGBYXG7K3TRk9aKWGdnzo0HZjh50Zu2XxPgqjMBDn8vid6eANY7ryB8tjyXuT7MZ8VtH-EDAJmI7rzJVvJGC6xQImZQRMuhcwJYpY-UooYKr8Dpcs-EGXqvxujuWV3zIUdLt0Pr9ZFlo3lh5jLvgP0r1sig3nl1Ki-uyFUevuKP19w_-V8GPhTwAAAP__st2HBg) in their dreams, and it made us wonder how many people even remember their dreams once they awake. Check out the story below, and then take our poll and let us know what you remember. One year ago, President Trump called it "a Great Honor for our Country" when an American was elected Pope for the first time in history, then, earlier this month, posted that _"If I wasn't in the White House, Leo wouldn't be in the Vatican."_ Now Trump is calling Pope Leo "WEAK on Crime," and Pope Leo is firing back: _"I have no fear of the Trump administration."_ This isn't a diplomatic spat. This is an open feud between the President of the United States and the leader of 1.4 billion Catholics. Only on today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ , Ayla Brown shares an exclusive breakdown of what's been said and how we got here. [Listen here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz1u7CAUQOHVQDcWv7YpKF7jbl6bEmG4tm-EwQI0E-8-SraQBZwjfR9P9_SYMO___Qm2b8VleLcEvUN1WH0uF-TWevXYT2wN894COsHE-GDqwWcXPabbKRrtBiBAUrB8mkbNRsMNPWwwwCVXEBmDeYIIUkBQYZv5OHERNUX7c2OKz5yxWZqBR6mNBq2MDmFdN6IYROylDp8Fcz9gS3d5QR1COWmyR-9XI_IfEQsRS4W1-hyHdBOxXCXCV6-e02rj9caUsI0TUWw_Pabfvv8J_bLiOwAA___PUWvy)!

Today's sponsor, [Insurify](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuK6zAYBOCnkbsE3S-FigMhXU67pZGl3_G_yJKRRELefvG-wnYDM3zFfD3mR8CM5fk_7ODHWucC755hDGgztlDqAaX30QKOHXvH8uwRZ065vlB5YXZOAfNnllPyKwAHMYFnxmhFtWNu2ryW0azGLkZaCTEtKjpldFKOcaVWKSf0p0Yls4xSK9yVJaGcAiWdinFZViIpJBy1Xb8rlrHBmj_1Be0a6z5lv41xdCL-EX4n_H60OiAOSPUYWEs_R2cj7oGIG5OGEq7jGa3linDdGRG3qfl0vDFn7NoQSZ97wPzrjz-d8vL8JwAA__8EJ3MD), helps drivers compare real-time quotes from top insurers so they can find better coverage and potentially save hundreds on car insurance.

|

## Iran Opens Strait of Hormuz to Shipping
Iran declared the [Strait of Hormuz "completely open"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuxCAUBU-DOyzABpuCIo27TZvSwvBZ_wjDCsham9NHTo6Q-knzNPNxW28WI6b7uz3AtJDXBGeN0BqUFYtN-QGp1lYstgNrxXSvDlfBhKJspHxevcX4WsfOmwAgYOjA8GlSkinNdbcb6weQQXKulZw37oQOfA5CSQFaK791aC4aG_nMGZsH3XM_SC1Bjlo6t22BjAw8tlz6z4yp7RDiKz-h9C4fXTR7a49KhjciFiKW8zx7lzZ3jUQsF5qIhY1ELHwiYrmc6GkL3XM5vr7pnxrFWixEGmGzKSfqwFYIWKDf2xG7YvzjxBixqomM7H5YjL_v7V_Jnkb8BAAA__8lkIBF) to commercial shipping on Friday as President Trump said a deal to end the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran was "very close," sending U.S. stocks soaring. The announcement was tied to the 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire reached Thursday. Trump said Israel is now "prohibited" from bombing Lebanon, though he insisted the [U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports will remain](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L-O8yAQBPCnwR0RYPCfguJr3OVrr7TWeB3vCYMFm0S5pz_l7hGuHmlGv_m4zlegSOn2Hw70vOU54bNGZMYyU4GUT0y1cgHig2qldKuBZqNMJ5WVephXoPiabbP6DdFg26DXfd851Y16bHYPBhbnAFApGzqjDazjsCy49GA1dKEh_25TVg9aqaEdL3pt3ejQ2dGFsCybsApX4lwun5kS77jFV35guYR8NNHvzGcV7T9hJmEm3nGnGN-ZMNOZI4WXMBMlxpKAKSeIwkxuaDvdtvJNlFzuxyl_kTJvcs_luH_JiAuknCTVAhhlQKi4UUFhpqb49XxSjFS7Xlh1O4B-Nhv-04kPb74DAAD__0_giN0) until a final agreement is reached. Reports surfaced that U.S. negotiators are weighing [releasing $20 billion in frozen Iranian assets](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u3CAURleDO0aAfzAFxUSRu5cmRaQ0FgOX8U0wWFzmWbP7yNnCq4909H3n18f64TBhfv5wO9gWy5rhpAStQV2xulwOyEStOmw7EmF-ksdVCTVxMXA5r8Fheq9DF2wEUNB3YKXW0ygmI0232agFPJwMbjB6GmMcegFO61l7ORmYTYf2solBzlKIuTc3GfrRjDAOZvT-8YhsEBCwlXr7UzC3DWJ6l0-oN1_2LtmttYNYf2dqYWo5z_O2U74YUwtk_iKmluvUBUtNgamFfCkHfxH3JRMGqMSV4A9MCUvm3tHGY6n8VV3G184DuMRPbBu_ijC1uMrvdyX13_tv1i_FY2D9929XRTjpJ9SjqzYc5-WjSbNBPHeH6f_e9qXIn1b9CwAA__-_KpJY) in exchange for Tehran's enriched uranium stockpile. Trump publicly denied the deal, posting that "no money will exchange hands." A second round of U.S.-Iran talks is expected Sunday and Monday in Islamabad, mediated by Pakistan, Egypt, and Turkey, ahead of an April 21 ceasefire deadline.
## Feds to Investigate Mystery of Missing Scientists
President Donald Trump announced Thursday he is [investigating the deaths and disappearances of U.S. scientists](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDsO2zAQRE9DdTL4l1iwCBCoc9qUAi2urA34Eci1Dd8-UK6QejAzeO_3fb0HTFiev0IGT3tdC3x6AiJoK7ZQ6gmld2oBKWPvWJ59w1VyaUeuRzGvMWD6rnqIfgeQoAbwYpqs4dYJNxzeObDWWCHlPmkhZxlVkJtT1mlh-MQH9Nca12IWnM_K3URUxhkw2pltezx2pjlEpNpufyoWOmBP3_qGdttqHpI_iM7O1A8mFyYXOuDAlK6MyeWoGS4gJpcQMxa8SAhrYXIxszLSiZHaK5_jVnOGQn18la2WHVuGODY4a6OrzdRCjwY7Uz-Pc2g-nh9MCbudmObPHPDf40D_pfDt5d8AAAD__xpOhf0) with classified access, calling the pattern "pretty serious stuff" while saying he hopes it proves random. At least 11 researchers are [now linked to the mystery](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO3CAQhJ8Gd5wAg88ULtLQ_WlTWhys7Y0wnNjNne7tI0d5g78baaRP882vr_UrYsG6_4wnLLy1tcKbCjBDX7HH2p5QibhH5BOJsO6UcDXKTFJZqec1Ryyf1Q552QAMjAMs-n6fnJq89sOxuMmOJjszOetnP3pvDWhtk3Kwze6RBlwumrJ61krNo7_pPDrvwFnvUno8NmEVZOTWb78bVj5gK5_2gn5L7RzKcjA_SYw_hAnChPp5NuKrEiZcYGGCssIEfRcm_CF5-QkTiDvWXbZN_te6YoaYJSWEykhMkluTqWFNmKFyLDK1uncgOmOVFD8kI8koteZDdiCIPR3QZYcXxAJZmDD0JT_fWArSdBdW7WfE8m84f-vt12L-BgAA__9Hx5T0), including an Alabama aerospace scientist. They worked on sensitive nuclear, aerospace, and UFO-related projects at NASA, Los Alamos, MIT, and Caltech. Missouri Rep. Eric Burlison called the cases ["deeply concerning"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGPpSAUhX8NdhpAUCkotrF7225pEK56NwiGyz73_fvJm6mmnvbky8k535_H8nAYMe2_3Qm2bnlJcFOEWqEsWFzKFySiWhzWE4kw7eRxkVwOLVetmJbgML4W1QS7AUjoG7BiHAfNByNMc1g1rNyZqVdrmIQz0gtvxtUPbttASx0atO82rsQkOJ9604nQa6NBK6O9X9eNKQ4Bay7d34ypHrDFV35C6Xw-m2iPWi9i_S8mZybn-76729GBaa85wX93YvpCmZzf397MgRXaI_8jYHJWWprBqO95604o6F1qySOkilSpDUjkrgtcgdAGhMDk3BQbrhtjRBpGpvh-Ooyfy-qPdD6t_AgAAP__vo2Miw) and too coincidental, requesting FBI involvement. Missing figures include retired Air Force Maj. Gen. William "Neil" McCasland, last seen in Albuquerque in February. However, law enforcement and some scientists say no connection has yet been established. The incidents range from confirmed homicides to disappearances and deaths ruled non-suspicious by authorities.
## NFL Impersonation Scam Scores $20 Million
Former Alabama football player Luther Davis secured 13 fraudulent loans totaling $19.8 million by [impersonating star NFL players](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O5CAQhJ8GZ4wAg38CgkuczaUXWoxp231qgwW9M_Lbr7yvsFlJpfpU-v4952dAwrT9DQd4XvOc4FMJmKHMWELKJ6RauQTkA2vFtNUFZ6NMJ5WVephjQLpm20S_AhhoG_C67zunulGPze7N0OsWOqd6E_USbe_Cas1qFzfqcdBdg_6mKasHrdTQjg8dWzc6cHZ0y_J6rcIqiMi5PP5nTLzDSld-Q3ks-WjI78xnFe0fYSZhpnSdufJdCTPdYGEmZYWZ9J3qmQtXYSb64h2KjOGNVQYi2CDSJfE4odScAkOUaSV5UrigVMlZbsCSckj3vCk-nh8kwtr1wqrtCEg_f_hXEt_efAcAAP__1hmGPw) to dupe lenders, according to criminal charges against him. Federal prosecutors say Davis and his accomplice, CJ Evins, used [wigs and fake IDs](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL0O3CAQhJ_G7jgBBv8UFGmuu7QpLc4s9kZrsFjuHL995LxC6hmN5vt-veaXR8K0_vQ7uBrznOBkglqhzFh8ygck5lo81h2ZMa284Kyl7oU0Qo1z8EjXbNrgIoCGrgWnhqG3sp_U1G7OqOFtF63U0uu30d2k-xiNtTYO_TCqsUV3r0mjRiXl2E0PFTo7WbBmssvyfsfGSAhYc3n8zpjqBpGu_IXyWPLekttqPbjpfjT62ejneZ6PmP_cFHfe6CcfuVRu9JM-dYMigv8iC08EKwS6xJkLiIC8fpCBxZEZRIokDvIXFBb7hyqKHYkwJxEykS-Csk8iFv8JgpcNdmiLC8d5l7gfGiPX3SP9e1j_S-vX6b8BAAD__wakkJ4) to impersonate NFL players, including Atlanta Falcons quarterback Michael Penix Jr., former Cleveland Browns tight end David Njoku, and Green Bay Packers safety Xavier McKinney. One lender alone was allegedly tricked into [wiring $4.375 million](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD3u4yAUxE-DOyyMwdgFxTbusu2WFoZH8jZ8WEDize1XzhX-3Ugz-mlm_ty2m8GA6f7bRNDN5y3BWQO0BmXDYlI-INXaisEWsVZM92px44xPlAk6zJszGD6b6Jz2ABzGDvSg1CTZtAxL99D7Mo-jYrCYXcpZeGmdUxP3Sg5sVoZ1qC8aE8M8MDaPSz-4US4SpFiktfvuiWDgsOXS_82Y2gN8-OQ3lN7m2AX9aO2oZPxF-Er4ep5nn3Zbj1xavRKEr8kHwtejZJ9z200IzYQn4Wt5xVxoxHDZ127C13_mjVBotE9MCT4U45Frg0KrNTGCowGSg0Lzq9HsqaCjkl8E5tQV7Y7z0nVSRLB7NBi-LduPrn1r_j8AAP__EbWQ0w) in McKinney's name, and authorities say the proceeds were funneled into fake companies, real estate, vehicles, and jewelry. The case is scheduled to return to federal court on April 27, where Davis is expected to plead guilty. The 2009 National Champion and his partner could face sentences of up to [20 years in prison](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2K2zAUhZ9G3ilIsuVYCy8Cg0tb0p-hdJpszLV17dyiHyNpYvL2JX2FWR8453zf23k8AzkK6zfw2JcljgH37LAUTCMlCHHDkHNJQMVTzhTWPNOohGq5aLjsRgvkHmNT2X5BVFhX2MvjsdWiNdJUt_7YGNVqhVqbqdZSz0Zi1zawSCNlt9iK-mebaGQnhehqc5C21kajboye52laWCPQUonp8DdSKDdc3CPeMR3m6CvX30rZMqtPTA1MDfu-H_Y8lfszZWp44jA1lITBUliZGpaYPCYODibwwK3j7r3cMHELd8oc5vk9o-XkN0w5BigUVh4WxzcHD0yZK-G5ixB4nuE5cX1pr6efv96-vH46vb78vnw9X75_vvz5cb0wNVSpt9tOzlFuj6wRqwdy_5-XD-m-9-pfAAAA__9UYpXI).

Feds to Investigate Mystery of Missing Scientists President Donald Trump announced Thursday he is with classified access, calling the pattern "pretty serious stuff" while saying he hopes it proves random. At least 11 researchers are , including an Alabama aerospace scientist. They worked on sensitive nuclear, aerospace, and UFO-related projects at NASA, Los Alamos, MIT, and Caltech. Missouri Rep. Eric Burlison called the cases and too coincidental, requesting FBI involvement. Missing figures include retired Air Force Maj. Gen. William "Neil" McCasland, last seen in Albuquerque in February. However, law enforcement and some scientists say no connection has yet been established. The incidents range from confirmed homicides to disappearances and deaths ruled non-suspicious by authorities. NFL Impersonation Scam Scores $20 Million Former Alabama football player Luther Davis secured 13 fraudulent loans totaling $19.8 million by to dupe lenders, according to criminal charges against him. Federal prosecutors say Davis and his accomplice, CJ Evins, used to impersonate NFL players, including Atlanta Falcons quarterback Michael Penix Jr., former Cleveland Browns tight end David Njoku, and Green Bay Packers safety Xavier McKinney. One lender alone was allegedly tricked into in McKinney's name, and authorities say the proceeds were funneled into fake companies, real estate, vehicles, and jewelry. The case is scheduled to return to federal court on April 27, where Davis is expected to plead guilty. name: AMAC Action
subject: Sign your BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING petition now
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e965836/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNjg0OGd2NEhWaA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MTg/LbmNsM0VYSVE3eQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNhb0JTZ2RiaHZSOTBscw/gaeNbdQ/s3mdc78e54a)
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | **Ban Non-Citizen Voting!**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, **[I’m writing today because our “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition Drive must be supercharged immediately.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** And at a moment like this, we are reaching out to Americans who still believe in election integrity, the Constitution, and the fundamental principle that **only citizens should decide our elections.** If you’ve ever heard of **AMAC Action** , you know that we are one of the nation’s leading conservative advocacy organizations—mobilizing millions of Americans to stand up for limited government, secure elections, and the values that made this country great. Right now, we need your voice. **[Please click here to submit your signed “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” petition in the next 48 hours.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** My friend, you know that with razor-thin margins in the House and Senate, all bets are off after the midterm elections. That means we must act **now** , while we still have the opportunity. We must **BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING** before it’s too late. Today, millions of illegal immigrants who entered the country are being counted in ways that directly impact political power. And that means:
---
* More congressional seats for states with large illegal populations
* More Electoral College votes
* More federal funding
* More political power

---
And more opportunity for non-citizens to end up on voter rolls. That’s exactly why AMAC Action launched this national petition drive. So far, **more than 100,000 petitions** have already been signed by concerned Americans. But it is not enough. **[To force action—to apply real pressure—we must reach 500,000 signed petitions.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** **Half a million.** That’s the kind of number that gets politicians’ attention. But without your signature, we won’t get there in time. To stop non-citizen voting, concerned citizens across the country must send one loud and unmistakable message:
---
1. **Only American citizens should be counted in the census.**
2. **Only American citizens should have a vote.**

---
[ **Sign the Petition** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
You’re receiving this message because you’ve been identified as someone who may be willing to take a stand on critical issues like this. And at a moment like this, every signature matters. Because without action, momentum is lost—and we cannot afford to lose momentum with the midterms approaching. When you sign and submit your petition in the next 48 hours with your petition sponsorship gift you will help AMAC Action:
---
* Distribute hundreds of thousands of additional petitions by mail, email, text, and social media
* Expand digital outreach to recruit more conservative seniors
* Organize state-level petition drives
* Deliver signed petitions directly to lawmakers
* Push election integrity legislation that safeguards your vote
* Fight for census reform so representation reflects citizens only

---
That’s a lot to accomplish. But we’ve seen what’s possible when Americans step forward. With the help of patriots just like you, we’ve already helped:
---
* Pass the Rescissions Act to cut wasteful spending
* Push the “One Big, Beautiful Bill” across the finish line
* Advance the SAVE Act in the House

---
And so much more. But now, we must finish the job. Stopping non-citizen voting is one of the most common-sense issues of our time. And if enough Americans take action—we can get it done. Some have chosen to ignore this issue. The Left is counting on that. But millions of Americans are taking action. We hope you will be one of them. **[Please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” petition and submit it within the next 48 hours.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_** **AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | **P.S.** Thank you for taking the time to read this message. **[Please click the link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” petition and submit it along with your petition sponsorship gift within the next 48 hours.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Protecting the integrity of our elections is one of the most important issues of our time—and we hope you’ll stand with AMAC Action today.
---
[ **Sign the Petition** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
_**[Support AMAC Action](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
---
2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1, Leesburg FL 34748
---
|
---
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e965836/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MTg/LbmNsM0VYSVE3eQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNhb0JTZ2RiaHZSOTBscw/gaeNbdQ/sak29a7985f)

name: Defend Our Courts
subject: Wisconsin Public Radio covered our secret weapon
body:
| | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below.
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://audience.constantcontact.com/preferences/unsubscribe?m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&c=372e9de6-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&ca=1db1eee6-745d-48fe-8afe-27701cdb2bbd) | [Update Profile](https://audience.constantcontact.com/preferences/update/init?ch=374622f4-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&c=372e9de6-c0cc-11f0-8fbb-0242a0b0d8a1&t=001bQU2ELUqJ1v8UBDk45Aplw==&m=001TiGr7G8G0an2bTkrhnK17w==&ca=1db1eee6-745d-48fe-8afe-27701cdb2bbd) | [Constant Contact Data Notice](https://www.constantcontact.com/legal/customer-contact-data-notice)
---
---
| | [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pUcMxdZEbprpM-FNl1iJqMQmj8wbI0Y5QkCVyyyByF2cyAHBU7opAD7_xGqfF2ivRJqnbe87TrGdLDvaYLqxkdSUn2fj-OwZ38ALk3lvTK5ipPZDHcpOaB4iFDOvLpxzt3Y3cHFZN9iGdj8Lpdvl9ErDq8FXa0pByewz4SC6qj9apcolBBIRu-sZVdJOKMVS6xzHwy7zH45Kno9OOcj1ZNpmWMGA5Z79HTXzyMS7WZXNLZakK6FibJHzZmpxMA_C&c=fKH3pcEKT6UD99HQdI-SaRiZZiMpLPe3jQxwcRPIl8oazvG0clfXUQ==&ch=XsIrUA9Uw-sNBgnG7mInvdenDcBrJuLeTnMcgenBfL_mcRbbqB0F9w==)
---
| Friend,
We did something different in Wisconsin, and people are sitting up and taking notice. With a smaller budget than our Pennsylvania Supreme Court race in 2025, we couldn't run a full field and TV campaign. Traditional organizers. Mailers. Ads on every screen.
That wasn't in the cards.
So instead of doing less of what everyone else does, we did something no one else was doing.
Our co-founder Joe Bachman was just interviewed by Wisconsin Public Radio about the cutting-edge voter contact technology we deployed in the state and how it helped us punch way above our weight:
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pUcMxdZEbprpM-FNl1iJqMQmj8wbI0Y5QkCVyyyByF2cyAHBU7opAD7_xGqfF2ivRJqnbe87TrGdLDvaYLqxkdSUn2fj-OwZ38ALk3lvTK5ipPZDHcpOaB4iFDOvLpxzt3Y3cHFZN9iGdj8Lpdvl9ErDq8FXa0pByewz4SC6qj9apcolBBIRu-sZVdJOKMVS6xzHwy7zH45Kno9OOcj1ZNpmWMGA5Z79HTXzyMS7WZXNLZakK6FibFvpLAByRreJ&c=fKH3pcEKT6UD99HQdI-SaRiZZiMpLPe3jQxwcRPIl8oazvG0clfXUQ==&ch=XsIrUA9Uw-sNBgnG7mInvdenDcBrJuLeTnMcgenBfL_mcRbbqB0F9w==)
---
| Here's the core idea: every Democrat deserves an organizer in their pocket.
An actual, interactive tool built specifically to talk a voter through exactly what they needed to know. Where to vote, what ID to bring, how the process works. One that could speak to Chris Taylor's record and positions on the issues. One that could answer questions with accurate information, at any hour, at a massive scale: we used it to reach over 1 million voters.
We share the concerns about AI's energy demands, economic disruption, and impact on workers. That's why we worked with our partners at Convos to keep our footprint minimal. And for what it's worth: this approach has a smaller environmental impact than a large mailer campaign.
AI is becoming a bigger part of political campaigns. As we read stories about deepfakes and misinformation, Defend Our Courts is proud to lead the way in using this technology responsibly and transparently to have real conversations with the voters we need to reach. This also isn't about replacing the field organizers and volunteers who are the backbone of our democracy. It's about giving them a force multiplier. Reaching voters they couldn't reach. Having conversations that would otherwise never happen.
Wisconsin showed it can work and we couldn't have done it without you.
Tens of thousands of Democrats across the country pitched in to fuel this work. You made a difference in a race that far too few people were paying attention to.
Court races are like that. Under the radar. Underestimated. Until suddenly they're not. 2026 will have more high-stakes judicial races, with the same type of stakes as Wisconsin and Pennsylvania. We want to continue bringing our winning formula to key races on a national scale. But we need your continued support to do it:
[If you believe in what we're building and what we proved is possible, please consider chipping in $25, $15, or whatever you can spare today to help us build for more court battles in 2026?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pUcMxdZEbprpM-FNl1iJqMQmj8wbI0Y5QkCVyyyByF2cyAHBU7opAD7_xGqfF2ivJHoOXlkHAlov6uBG0OHBA4igH-oh2pc24qaerZwi11oib3s07SsYfhaJEnGpfikD_ZiQHIT2rj637g6TR7iomP5KUJMT9Ll_EV-f_brjVQgGP1_er1niiCa2jej63U6xs0LisAIze58eS6jDKJk_oiCiMHnP4DCjMSK9NoIxysyO8eqKjQOhlwveJ_ACtdx_&c=fKH3pcEKT6UD99HQdI-SaRiZZiMpLPe3jQxwcRPIl8oazvG0clfXUQ==&ch=XsIrUA9Uw-sNBgnG7mInvdenDcBrJuLeTnMcgenBfL_mcRbbqB0F9w==)
---
| | | | | [DONATE $10](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pUcMxdZEbprpM-FNl1iJqMQmj8wbI0Y5QkCVyyyByF2cyAHBU7opAD7_xGqfF2ivRJqnbe87TrGdLDvaYLqxkdSUn2fj-OwZ38ALk3lvTK5ipPZDHcpOaB4iFDOvLpxzt3Y3cHFZN9iGdj8Lpdvl9ErDq8FXa0pByewz4SC6qj9apcolBBIRu-sZVdJOKMVS6xzHwy7zH45Kno9OOcj1ZNpmWMGA5Z79HTXzyMS7WZXNLZakK6FibK5ss4f0xWfs&c=fKH3pcEKT6UD99HQdI-SaRiZZiMpLPe3jQxwcRPIl8oazvG0clfXUQ==&ch=XsIrUA9Uw-sNBgnG7mInvdenDcBrJuLeTnMcgenBfL_mcRbbqB0F9w==)
---

clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | == | Friend, We did something different in Wisconsin, and people are sitting up and taking notice. With a smaller budget than our Pennsylvania Supreme Court race in 2025, we couldn't run a full field and TV campaign. Traditional organizers. Mailers. Ads on every screen. That wasn't in the cards. So instead of doing less of what everyone else does, we did something no one else was doing. Our co-founder Joe Bachman was just interviewed by Wisconsin Public Radio about the cutting-edge voter contact technology we deployed in the state and how it helped us punch way above our weight: | == | Here's the core idea: every Democrat deserves an organizer in their pocket. An actual, interactive tool built specifically to talk a voter through exactly what they needed to know. Where to vote, what ID to bring, how the process works. One that could speak to Chris Taylor's record and positions on the issues. One that could answer questions with accurate information, at any hour, at a massive scale: we used it to reach over 1 million voters. We share the concerns about AI's energy demands, economic disruption, and impact on workers. That's why we worked with our partners at Convos to keep our footprint minimal. And for what it's worth: this approach has a smaller environmental impact than a large mailer campaign. AI is becoming a bigger part of political campaigns. As we read stories about deepfakes and misinformation, Defend Our Courts is proud to lead the way in using this technology responsibly and transparently to have real conversations with the voters we need to reach. This also isn't about replacing the field organizers and volunteers who are the backbone of our democracy. It's about giving them a force multiplier. Reaching voters they couldn't reach. Having conversations that would otherwise never happen. Wisconsin showed it can work and we couldn't have done it without you. Tens of thousands of Democrats across the country pitched in to fuel this work. You made a difference in a race that far too few people were paying attention to. Court races are like that. Under the radar. Underestimated. Until suddenly they're not. 2026 will have more high-stakes judicial races, with the same type of stakes as Wisconsin and Pennsylvania. We want to continue bringing our winning formula to key races on a national scale. But we need your continued support to do it: == | | | | | == | == | == | == Thank you for being in this with us. Team Defend our Courts | | == | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | |

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | History rewards timing. | Not explanations. This is one of those moments. The $2,000 tariff dividend is already available. But it’s more than a payout. It’s a marker. Trump labels it a Restoration Dividend. Others see a broader reset taking shape. This isn’t about generosity, butreclaiming control. The next phase is where momentum builds. Policy, capital, and action collide. Early movers move first. Gov. Greg Abbott [threatened](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu2zAMQE8jbwwk2rHiwUMXbb9rR0O2KIetLAUyf5zcvnCAnqAzwcfH9-tr-vKcOK8__UajvGKZMh17IhGqEy_0KIkXpv07B6qRKwnn9zyhxh50B-Y2Bc_pPXVNGGcdBtPQaKztr0Yb0zb3cca5XyjEdhi6OcSIdjDRLtbeommvi2l4PGG6MzdjtLni5aZ174PH2IZhtiaqTlNgKfUidxJ6-T2md3lSvSxla9J4F3nsqv2h0Cl0x3Fc_uxezqFCd36j0H3WFLrzlEKnO4XOWIVuLU9YK63g57mIgNwreaG8A2oNG6fEJQNniN85cF4h1rLB5n-XCh8oLCxMO5xCwAvBv2IKXVPH8DhOxt5b1el185w-1vJ_rZ8j_g0AAP__X12UgQ) to pull a combined total of about $200 million in state funding from Houston, Dallas, and Austin over their ICE cooperation policies, sending letters to the cities' respective mayors on Thursday.

# Saturday, April 18, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1934, entrepreneur C.A. Tannahill opened the country's [first laundromat](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL8GOiPbGAyFi2vocu2VaInXYSUHI3svhL8_kV-4brWaGb2Zn9t8A4q0Pb7hiY7fIc0bHiUiM-aZ7rinSHfC8rt5zIEyMm3nMmupeyGNUMPsgeI5m9q7RfpR1eiUtX2npFJtvTpcRtDQDT5IbUbTou3MGGxr22C8sX1N7gqTRg1KSdXpZpCyBw86tH5crAqVkeiJU254RcY3lBDP9MLc3NOzjm5l3kvVflV6qvR0HEcT0ttcNS5BpafrrPSUNsErFeHhFLSJlQqnfArYM0WhBqHG1ohAubAoGINIO2Zg9OKAsgJjJrh-W7ncIWUWR8q8ig9SnZ3fD4qRSm8rIx9PoPgB5P_N-nL6LwAA__90pI8P) in Fort Worth. The "Wash-a-teria" contained four electric washing machines that were rented out by the hour. Buc-ee's is closing one of its Texas locations. It's a big gas station, but not a [Buc-ee's-size](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGuqzAQRVcDHcgeHAOFi9_Q5bevRAMeh5GMjWwnhN0_JVt47dXVOdL5uc93ZM_h8R93MuXt4hzozJ5KoTTzSkf0vDLlZ7CUHCcqHK5lBgG6EaqRw2yR_TWr2ppF2FHWZGTf65sUUnb1ZgBVP6Lq9DJiL4dOaNVJ1y-LBY03RzWbD0woOUgp5A3aQQiNFsF1dlx66SolyHKJqS0bFXpjdv6KL0rtGvfam62UI1fdvwqmCqbzPNv9yhgwlBg4fk4VTMszc6CcK5gwFV49fceVKDdHTKXx-MIVm9XHTLkBADFoodpjO-pk7HGy95x1Xynx2JH9113-Vuxl4DcAAP__uxKA6w) gas station, if you know what we mean. Read the story in _Around Texas_. One year ago, President Trump called it "a Great Honor for our Country" when an American was elected Pope for the first time in history, then, earlier this month, posted that _"if I wasn't in the White House, Leo wouldn't be in the Vatican."_ Now Trump is calling Pope Leo _"WEAK on Crime,"_ and Pope Leo is firing back: _"I have no fear of the Trump administration."_ This isn't a diplomatic spat. This is an open feud between the President of the United States and the leader of 1.4 billion Catholics. Only on today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ , Ayla Brown shares an exclusive breakdown of what's been said and how we got here. [Listen here!](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzz1uwzAMQOHT2FsMUvJfBg1dsqVrR4EWqYSAYhmymsS3L9or9ADvAd_X1V9Jk663T3qIq--Y_SqvPUmtUrwG2XLSoLJ_rywlapGq67F4A2Y8QX_C2TNpOnzfsluAz9iKw2kaBwRE295dtDAQWjvhfJ44WAkDURwHM4wLQ4itut8Z9DgjAg6mmwFGYjLR8nmZMDY9CGvNpat3qfKmPaYjP6V0IT_a5O61bntjPxpzacylyFJo5S4djblsmeVdC2FbHG8vTUn3cWp6uD1I019f_6d-OvMTAAD__z2ibDc) Today's sponsor, [FungaBeam](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LkO2zAQBNCvoToZvI-CRQJDneMmQNIJS3JpE6EOSPT194HjFOnT7sMOBvPjNJ6g1DJfvsGEvj3zMs742Cu2httYIq5LLbHgfpsTbrls2Mr8CiOnXPdU9syOCUp9jbJLPtDkWIeeGaMVo4yJ7uqTs9Y5hlSLSB06aRXEbFSQ4CQH7Ip_h1HJLGOUKX6wlGpIwLNILhiWiaSYSlu2Q7tiwyfsub6WO26HuExd9dfW1p2IL4QPhA8VK8b6622EDxrRShFyz5VWvRQm9o4F6LlN3LgMFoMjYogwrVAu81gSEUdivv57MEfC9QobTB87K9afuaJ_4RY-X99_Dudu82l9lFrLrg2R9DJBqX9qtv8b9-757wAAAP__DRiIrQ), offers a simple, drug-free light-therapy device designed to target stubborn nail fungus at the source and help restore clearer, healthier nails from the comfort of home.
