* * *
# **Iran fires on tanker near Oman after re-closing Strait of Hormuz, escalating US standoff**
The Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps **[fired on at least one ship about 20 nautical miles northeast of Oman](https://substack.com/redirect/78b14b13-1e8d-4541-b738-ec3bbc026cf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Saturday after Tehran again closed the Strait of Hormuz--through which roughly a fifth of global oil supplies typically pass--opening fire unprovoked on a tanker while both vessel and crew remained safe. Audio recordings indicate two Indian vessels were forced back, including an Indian-flagged VLCC supertanker carrying 2 million barrels of Iraqi oil, while Iran's joint military command said "control of the Strait of Hormuz has returned to its previous state ... under strict management and control of the armed forces."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/78b14b13-1e8d-4541-b738-ec3bbc026cf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Mixed signals from Iran** : Saturday's attack comes amid confusion over the narrow waterway's status, with Iran claiming it reopened the strait Friday while simultaneously warning it would shut it again in response to the US-led naval blockade. Iranian parliament official Ebrahim Azizi said the strait was "returning to the status quo" of ships requiring Iranian naval authorization and toll payment before transiting, while the IRGC warned it would continue blocking transit as long as the US blockade of Iranian ports remained in effect.
* **US holds firm on blockade** : US Central Command shared images of patrolling helicopters and vessels "providing a visible presence in support of freedom of navigation" and said it has sent 21 ships back to Iran since the blockade began Monday. Pakistani mediators are working to arrange a second round of US-Iran talks, but arrangements remain in flux and neither side has formally committed.

* * *
# **Boston denies funding "wellness vouchers" for LGBTQ migrants after backlash over $500 perks program**
Boston Mayor Michelle Wu's office **[denied reports that city funds supported a program](https://substack.com/redirect/67c0c614-8f29-489d-a1d6-e917896124f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** offering LGBTQ migrants up to $500 in "wellness" perks including yoga, gym memberships, creative arts, nature-based wellness and hair styling through advocacy group OUTnewcomers' "Belonging Matters" program. A city spokesperson said "No funds have been distributed or directed for these purposes" and the organization's $7,500 grant through the Mayor's Office of LGBTQ+ Advancement "may not be used for the voucher program referenced."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67c0c614-8f29-489d-a1d6-e917896124f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Conflicting claims create confusion** : OUTnewcomers' registration form promised applicants $250 to $500 in "wellness allowances" evaluated case-by-case, but the organization later described the program as offering "small vouchers of $50 or less" for "haircuts, acupuncture, or massage"--creating a discrepancy between how the initiative was initially presented and later characterized. The mayor's office declined to answer what the $7,500 fund had originally been approved for.
* **What 's next**: OUTnewcomers announced Thursday it temporarily suspended the program due to "security threats" amid online backlash calling it wasteful taxpayer spending. Founded by Sal Khan, a queer Pakistani journalist, the group only launched its website in April and does not list a required 990 nonprofit disclosure form showing organizational structure, leadership and revenue.

* * *
# **Gavin Newsom fundraises off Swalwell vacancy hours after rape allegations force resignation**
California Gov. Gavin Newsom **[sent a fundraising email shortly after former Rep. Eric Swalwell (D-CA) resigned](https://substack.com/redirect/2ecb8201-aca2-461b-a52c-ade048547a92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Tuesday amid sexual misconduct allegations including rape accusations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2ecb8201-aca2-461b-a52c-ade048547a92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The email said:** "With a very slim Republican majority in Congress, I was not going to give Mike Johnson even a single extra day before filling this seat" and asking for $35 donations through his Campaign for Democracy PAC. Despite the disturbing nature of the claims--which prompted Justice Department, Manhattan DA, and LA County Sheriff investigations--Newsom's message did not address the allegations directly, instead focusing only on "the political stakes of the vacancy and the narrow Republican majority in the House." Newsom scheduled the special election for August 18, claiming it's "the earliest date allowed under state law."

[| | | | | James Downs
---
@jamesd0wns

Audio recordings indicate two Indian vessels were forced back, including an Indian-flagged VLCC supertanker carrying 2 million barrels of Iraqi oil, while Iran's joint military command said "control of the Strait of Hormuz has returned to its previous state ... under strict management and control of the armed forces." | | ---|---|--- Mixed signals from Iran : Saturday's attack comes amid confusion over the narrow waterway's status, with Iran claiming it reopened the strait Friday while simultaneously warning it would shut it again in response to the US-led naval blockade. Team,
It might seem a little early for this, but we're about to start printing yard signs.
Most campaigns wait until later because yard signs are EXPENSIVE.
But we're not most campaigns!
We're building this movement neighbor by neighbor, yard by yard. We want to get these signs up as early as possible so we can keep getting our name out there and keep proving that we can do this.
So you're going to hear me ask this a lot for the next couple of weeks:
**[Can you chip in $20, $10, or whatever you can to help us hit our $10,000 goal for yard signs?](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9e2d1974-700f-4b1e-8a8d-9dd9b022c209?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ HELP US GET YARD SIGNS!](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9e2d1974-700f-4b1e-8a8d-9dd9b022c209?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We have real momentum right now. Let's keep it going.
Gratefully,
Rachel Wallace

subject: Bumping this for you.
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129705228/615271976/-605806849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjE0NTNlOS0yZTNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoAwKbeuno9G5JEB9VUUFoxj8I1RH7EkjylovFagMr8=&emci=a6601723-923a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=eb1453e9-2e3b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=27257697) Friend, Earlier this month, I sent an email asking you to [**sign on as a grassroots endorser of my re-election campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129705232/615271982/-605806849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjE0NTNlOS0yZTNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoAwKbeuno9G5JEB9VUUFoxj8I1RH7EkjylovFagMr8=&emci=a6601723-923a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=eb1453e9-2e3b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=27257697) **I’m incredibly grateful to all the folks who've signed on this far. But according to our records, we haven’t seen your signature come through just yet, friend.** We’ve been building this re-election campaign with the help of mid-Michiganders like you, and every signature makes a huge difference. It sends a clear message – one that says we’re strong, determined, and ready for whatever comes our way. [**Will you join this grassroots team and help us fight back by adding your name?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129705236/615271986/-605806849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjE0NTNlOS0yZTNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoAwKbeuno9G5JEB9VUUFoxj8I1RH7EkjylovFagMr8=&emci=a6601723-923a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=eb1453e9-2e3b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=27257697) | [Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129705239/615271991/-605806849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjE0NTNlOS0yZTNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoAwKbeuno9G5JEB9VUUFoxj8I1RH7EkjylovFagMr8=&emci=a6601723-923a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=eb1453e9-2e3b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=27257697)

Thank you,
Kristen
**P.S.** I’ve attached my original message below. I look forward to receiving [**your signature soon!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129705242/615271998/-605806849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjE0NTNlOS0yZTNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoAwKbeuno9G5JEB9VUUFoxj8I1RH7EkjylovFagMr8=&emci=a6601723-923a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=eb1453e9-2e3b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=27257697)
**\------ Forwarded Message ------**
From: Kristen McDonald Rivet
Date: Sat, April 4, 2025 at 12:02PM
Subject: quick request. (not asking for money)
Friend,
This is a different kind of email than I usually send. I’m not asking for a donation today.
Instead, I’m asking you to personally endorse my re-election campaign as we head into this critical time before Election Day.
Election experts are calling MI-08 one of the most competitive districts in the country – the “tipping point” seat that could decide control of the House.
That means what happens here in mid-Michigan could have real consequences for the whole country.
[**We’re putting together a list of 500 people who are willing to stand up early and say they’re with us in this fight. I’d really like your name to be one of them.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129705247/615272005/-605806849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjE0NTNlOS0yZTNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoAwKbeuno9G5JEB9VUUFoxj8I1RH7EkjylovFagMr8=&emci=a6601723-923a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=eb1453e9-2e3b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=27257697)
[Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129705249/615272009/-605806849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjE0NTNlOS0yZTNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoAwKbeuno9G5JEB9VUUFoxj8I1RH7EkjylovFagMr8=&emci=a6601723-923a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=eb1453e9-2e3b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=27257697)
---
Adding your name takes only a minute – but it means a lot. Because the truth is, we’re up against a lot right now.
As we speak, the GOP is airing bogus ads to flip this seat – already pouring over $1 million into attacks because they know how close this race is.
But with a strong grassroots team standing shoulder-to-shoulder with me, I know we can win – and keep delivering for mid-Michigan.
[**So I’m asking – will you add your name to endorse my re‐election campaign today? Every signature helps show the strength of this grassroots movement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129705252/615272017/-605806849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjE0NTNlOS0yZTNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoAwKbeuno9G5JEB9VUUFoxj8I1RH7EkjylovFagMr8=&emci=a6601723-923a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=eb1453e9-2e3b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=27257697)

clean_body: | Friend, Earlier this month, I sent an email asking you to I’m incredibly grateful to all the folks who've signed on this far. But according to our records, we haven’t seen your signature come through just yet, friend. We’ve been building this re-election campaign with the help of mid-Michiganders like you, and every signature makes a huge difference. It sends a clear message – one that says we’re strong, determined, and ready for whatever comes our way. | Thank you, Kristen P.S. I’ve attached my original message below. I look forward to receiving \------ Forwarded Message ------ From: Kristen McDonald Rivet Date: Sat, April 4, 2025 at 12:02PM Subject: quick request. (not asking for money) Friend, This is a different kind of email than I usually send. I’m not asking for a donation today. Instead, I’m asking you to personally endorse my re-election campaign as we head into this critical time before Election Day. Election experts are calling MI-08 one of the most competitive districts in the country – the “tipping point” seat that could decide control of the House. That means what happens here in mid-Michigan could have real consequences for the whole country. Adding your name takes only a minute – but it means a lot. Because the truth is, we’re up against a lot right now. As we speak, the GOP is airing bogus ads to flip this seat – already pouring over $1 million into attacks because they know how close this race is. But with a strong grassroots team standing shoulder-to-shoulder with me, I know we can win – and keep delivering for mid-Michigan. Thanks for standing with me in this fight, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Gary Sinise, American Veterans Center
subject: Memorial Day 2026: Honor our veterans with me
body:
| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8ce33ebdfcf4a46b29aa0afc5c752e9&_e=W0AzTWmS6QjUiqysKnwcumBIbKt4rRqt94ShBqBY8KslT4aXoP3s1F6XPHRVhAv-rJJmpufaEuclZmoifovqsfmrddafYtKL3QMjeoEU-ef9odr2Da4P-rg1uq5_vjtwf5yDVKv6S7mvL2A7iJ1RQPyWVMOR9Fr6v-Hdurl-nGXKcdABUWccpLI8SMEJVlKleXMaQGTnHyqZT7eNSpoUItGinxvieh4_ipYQePpuCYGmcI79SH6nywDkwJy3eRlOqipVT9UeptPwlgcg7W4lmdAFTxFIwoED8Zx-XoTZlFjKZ2QhAKrWd2p2AORIoUkIUBxhSLpyGgbklel7Z8pebJ91umjp36lxrgT-LfEcRpzgJELQZdlckL3oMA2RDyZkOeuyhYgO321ntGgvedcim0FzIczTBspbGemOp1J4copHUg939Uuw-LC2c04Nfa0jRCXHVbcT6C8R-82zTUnpV4lLjb1Ze9e6Uef5i3NP8m84yL8RLfooUUu3QWreCrexIgC_Bra2M6T1TmySlFNP9988mhw_2O8qDeYkoayoNBFUkRb1nDju-G92t5hPaNvq-ZQXl4imFtQxftJ55o40KcC7jRfqdChnQcj0wL0jgu3ixGVu5tsVhLKnTTQAVzfMS7nWln3rki38fcCHBacUWwPKTRO4igWOXQqcwRtBrM92J556-EqjSVf8xX4dmmrH)
---
Peter,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8ce33ebdfcf4a46b29aa0afc5c752e9&_e=W0AzTWmS6QjUiqysKnwcumBIbKt4rRqt94ShBqBY8KslT4aXoP3s1F6XPHRVhAv-rJJmpufaEuclZmoifovqsfmrddafYtKL3QMjeoEU-ef9odr2Da4P-rg1uq5_vjtwf5yDVKv6S7mvL2A7iJ1RQPyWVMOR9Fr6v-Hdurl-nGXKcdABUWccpLI8SMEJVlKleXMaQGTnHyqZT7eNSpoUItGinxvieh4_ipYQePpuCYGmcI79SH6nywDkwJy3eRlOzKLPRv4McICwWTTekqLvNCguol6GU6UWkmofBnK2MexKPHXkH2gIluzfosYL5fQagggMY-oksrbkw3sxxzIQ424yYWv4_RDWZsFzUBzJg9rLZilneaPZjvFjmpi7FgZb_4xfJZShkUjO1jVWtX9i6buLOCLd9AH35dvJRk2G7-xIeAITUly34KAUC4xM6OIDhS7dypugd56yNoAayrE2tumVA1cU6UDGJ7k9D1NQLeB00qrMTkyQA46SAJ3nfqraCb4--wmTEou3lMhv518h3qj7jOnVAz5gS8a91B-Q9yzbtSEL7pLlDOHbHgiY6zaZKoyJ2UZVSLzHl7a-Zx4nO6mM4FJYdrVVqkh7582W9OJLlgI6nsmu210AL6eauZWiYCOTw_UGeOJMKFuZ2DxhzbmKfCZ2zselt7hAzvhVDAJSRpShATJE2_VK-eZF1tJy)

Peter, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. **Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.** **[In light of America’s 250th birthday and the special opportunity we have to honor veterans this year, will you chip in today to help support the parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8ce33ebdfcf4a46b29aa0afc5c752e9&_e=W0AzTWmS6QjUiqysKnwcumBIbKt4rRqt94ShBqBY8KslT4aXoP3s1F6XPHRVhAv-rJJmpufaEuclZmoifovqsfmrddafYtKL3QMjeoEU-ef9odr2Da4P-rg1uq5_vjtwf5yDVKv6S7mvL2A7iJ1RQPyWVMOR9Fr6v-Hdurl-nGXKcdABUWccpLI8SMEJVlKleXMaQGTnHyqZT7eNSpoUItGinxvieh4_ipYQePpuCYGmcI79SH6nywDkwJy3eRlO7WPy_9jXfTuh7H2AUGxISHC8HHT6wCh9R_zD5bJ1ZEMHXoprCyfbSB3yqh6x4ujD8MDDg06k0AVHzVA20RryRidk4zDOloGNGEJlgqFhPbbK_Lk2eKgZLRhqEIPrnIHdcu7vmD2OF5Z-Yn3fLcbiYqSaWEHeCmzuyNX7qekbt6VlwbnxxHPRNcLmuydq42dhyyUqdel2fjhURv48TZZmeF0-eVzlzbPwrpFvE7nff3JPRyp0JeAhHHK9IyCU0gVuvIRXFB2D55Ymt6TMoRz7YIn80sGoZZ7Y6ofdkO6uTadVh4IPbZbtqfQV0nQjMBo2fh9iMEUteQxMb58eOaKizXEx3lE3dJBn0kpP2itBLp86Jk-549TJnhGDpQ6wEHn1BbZJ1dFhhDk6Ue8gFD4nUUclNW4beGf1m7ISYLZQmZNjekV5XKozk76CX84TxE6S)**

Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. | | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like:
---
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars.

* Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---

On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. **Peter, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. ** [**And please, if you’re able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day parade right now during America’s 250****th****birthday.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b8ce33ebdfcf4a46b29aa0afc5c752e9&_e=W0AzTWmS6QjUiqysKnwcumBIbKt4rRqt94ShBqBY8KslT4aXoP3s1F6XPHRVhAv-rJJmpufaEuclZmoifovqsfmrddafYtKL3QMjeoEU-ef9odr2Da4P-rg1uq5_vjtwf5yDVKv6S7mvL2A7iJ1RQPyWVMOR9Fr6v-Hdurl-nGXKcdABUWccpLI8SMEJVlKleXMaQGTnHyqZT7eNSpoUItGinxvieh4_ipYQePpuCYGmcI79SH6nywDkwJy3eRlO0fH8-FSdV2_uFjfEOJRb9oQYtjhsraBDYHZLKhdMA4WDreErkuPIKSkaUDwKctf6q4MNedq-_Wd6bGzYW0_EJxLLCU3dzsEX1ABA2sPkacPdC7fRa8lN27qL0jJ9DzEj2dt-nQE72aIuaEUx_BuyQU0T5wrF7R6hiUMAjmfCyC1_0enXpEN9mkpCW7GEFYCE9yhq_Xk_LrCTo5D2Wa6PSaQz3vDuLTylp6tND2cP2p9lZvEavdtpm6eavi7B3Q-rTnGmoKGtB5SpbbseUjQ5O3MrqREtn6AuwSCe3EAIcPv-J8uMHb9oUcOci-cQFt1pg-rdMuBVAhlmiD2yxFH51vJHF61rqHsgdxzAPm8xxV221H0-vg9NZflz0K2Asdp8YKkCUVvuGqosKbNqSwq7NAPs6G3QSdVJISoD0HDeOTmPZflsDtmrZhPVhVxGLXPW)

And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. clean_body: | | | Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250th birthday. Peter, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. The 2026 National Memorial Day Parade is a once-in-a-lifetime moment where we need to do all we can to honor our country and our veterans. Bigger crowds. More veterans. More young people learning what courage, service, and sacrifice really mean. Historically, AVC has been able to do this at a fraction of what other major public events cost to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded entirely by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country. | | Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our annual American Veterans Conference, which allows young cadets a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, Vietnam, and our modern wars. Produce veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But of course, the National Memorial Day Parade is AVC's flagship event honoring America's veterans. And this year's parade will be the largest in their history of hosting the parade. If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. | | | | | WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250**th birthday overlap. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Peter, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honarary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade P.S. Peter, America is stepping into its 250th year, and this Memorial Day begins that national remembrance. Veterans across generations have given their lives to defend America and all she stands for. And for the Greatest Generation in particular, this may be the last time they're able to join us at this year's National Memorial Day Parade. There's no better send-off we can give them than to make sure they're present to honor their fallen brethren during America's 250th birthday. The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

body:
Dems want him gone — do you?

This is outrageous, Friend.
Cassidy Hutchinson did what so many others in the GOP were too afraid to do:
**She told the truth under oath about what happened in the Trump White House leading up to January 6th.**
But now, that’s made her a top target by Trump and the Department of Justice – the very system that’s supposed to protect witnesses, not go after them.
This sets a dangerous precedent for anyone considering speaking out.
If telling the truth under oath makes you a target, it puts _every_ future witness at risk. We can’t stay silent while that happens.

null: Haley just took RFK Jr. to task for his recklessly dangerous, anti-science leadership at HHS. She told him directly: **_“You have abused your office. You have gutted America's public health. You should be ashamed.”_**
RFK Jr. has absolutely no business anywhere near our public health system after he:
**👉 FIRED** the CDC director and replaced key health leaders with anti-vaccine extremists.
💉 **CANCELLED** vaccine campaigns and downplayed deadly measles outbreaks as cases surged across the country.
🧬 **SHUT DOWN** critical mRNA vaccine research, halting work on pediatric cancer, HIV, and public health innovation.
😷 **BLAMED** __ autism on childhood vaccines _and_ prenatal Tylenol – _even as real experts call his claims junk science._
📉 **LAID OFF** hundreds of CDC staffers, crippling our response to the respiratory illness season.
Enough is enough, null. Haley knows it, and we're betting you know it too.
**[That's why we're asking 200 respondents from 18326 to let us know what they think. Tell us before midnight:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17141?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=2784%2E49239%2EiTq7f9)**

| | | [YES](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17141?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=2784%2E49239%2EiTq7f9)
---
| [NO](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17141?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=2784%2E49239%2EiTq7f9)
---
**POLL EXPIRES: 11:59 p.m. on April 18, 2026**
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17142?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=2784%2E49239%2EiTq7f9) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/17140?t=11&akid=2784%2E49239%2EiTq7f9)

Thank you,
Haley

# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=6186%2E582294%2Ejnm_zy)
Is there anything we can say to **[convince you to support Chris Pappas today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260418_1.mZJWEc&amount=5&refcode=em20260418-1&t=2&akid=6186%2E582294%2Ejnm_zy)**
What if we told you that New Hampshire could decide the Senate majority – and **whether Trump has a rubber stamp for his agenda or a check on his power?**
What if we told you Chris is TIED with his GOP opponent John Sununu – and **political experts no longer consider this a safe blue seat?**
What if we told you Sununu is backed by corporate special interests, right-wing super PACs, and Donald Trump – while **Chris is relying on people like you to chip in?**

The RINO Establishment, Soros-funded Swamp, and Radical Left are already regrouping their quick revenge behind the scenes. | | They’re still raising MILLIONS to prop up weak candidates and HIJACK this safe red district right out from under us, and they’re hoping you think this is already over. They are holding on to their dream of HUMILIATING the America First movement by installing an empty suit politician who will bow down to the deep state. No matter what, I will never back down. I’m the hardcore conservative who will codify Trump’s executive orders, secure the border, drain the Swamp, and never back down. That’s why I’m coming to YOU right now. My swearing-in gives us massive momentum, but momentum without fuel dies fast. Will you rush a donation of $25, $50, $100 or more TODAY to make sure I don’t just get sworn in... but SECURE THIS SEAT for the long haul against every RINO and Radical who comes after me? | | Thank you for having my back from day one. Together, we’re delivering on Trump’s promises and putting America First. For Georgia and America, Congressman-Elect Clay Fuller (GA-14) Air Force Veteran | Cancer Survivor | America First Republican | | PAID FOR BY CLAY FULLER FOR CONGRESS, INC PO Box 849, Trenton, GA, 30752, USA USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT OF THE UNITED STATES AIR FORCE OR THE DEPARTMENT OF WAR

name: Ilhan
subject: I reject this 100%
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Here’s what it means to be a grassroots campaign
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2179%2E791427%2E-KZ9kU)
Friend, how many times have you heard a campaign say they are “grassroots”? You probably wonder what that actually means, or if it’s really true.
Well, let me put it in perspective.
A lot of politicians raise their money the easy way. They make nice with lobbyists, corporate PACs, billionaires, and special interests. They offer access, or even support for one policy or another, in exchange for a mountain of cash. In some cases, so much money that it can practically buy you a seat in Congress. And of course, some of those same people will still claim to run a “grassroots” campaign.
It’s a form of legalized bribery that persists in American politics, especially after the _Citizens United_ ruling. **It’s something I reject 100%.**
When I tell you that this is a grassroots, people-powered campaign, I mean it. We don’t rely on the support of the mega-wealthy or corporate interests — just regular people who believe in our progressive mission.
In 2025 alone, my campaign received almost **150,000 individual contributions** from across the country, and the average donation amount was **only $19.**
Compare that to politicians who sometimes rely on just a single billionaire or corporate-backer to fund their campaigns, and the difference is clear. It gives me the freedom to fight for what I believe in and what helps my constituents the most — and tune out the noise of the wealthy lobbyists and Super PACs.
But it does mean that for this fundraising model to work, I need to reach out to you from time to time and ask for your contribution.
[**So please: Consider making your first donation to my campaign today and help us stay truly grassroots. This campaign and this entire movement will always be people-powered, because we are fighting for the needs of the great many instead of just the wealthy and powerful few.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr26.yEIO3a&refcode=em260418-1-180&t=2&akid=2179%2E791427%2E-KZ9kU)

My team sees that data every day. **_But none of it tells me what life actually feels like for you, Peter, in your area._** It doesn’t show how rising prices are affecting your family. It doesn’t capture what’s changed in your community. And it definitely doesn’t reflect the frustrations people carry quietly every day. I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?

clean_body: If there’s something you think Washington isn’t getting right, this is the moment to say it. | | | I want to be honest with you. In Washington, we’re surrounded by polls, charts, and reports telling us what voters are supposed to think heading into November. My team sees that data every day. But none of it tells me what life actually feels like for you, Peter, in your area. It doesn’t show how rising prices are affecting your family. It doesn’t capture what’s changed in your community. And it definitely doesn’t reflect the frustrations people carry quietly every day. That’s why I’m asking you to take a few minutes to complete the Your input helps senior leadership understand what matters before decisions are locked in for November. It gives a voice to conservatives who don’t show up in polling models or headlines. If there’s something you think Washington isn’t getting right,or isn’t hearing enough, this is the moment to say it. I want to know what you’re actually seeing and dealing with right now, Peter, and how I and other leaders can help fix what isn’t working. Now they want to flip it back. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=77ba8455aa774b3cb95bfd729315c31a&_e=j6TzbLMdn3Ef2LTUWeNfTvwCx0n4y_BJzT7G5CZeAqmGF0HjoZ-cLVDMqzjQz91gk8I309uvBFgZWTJl7jeQca6JDah0svCB_DoxyB2XtQjncJ8xO84WlAnModDJHSOQmbrfUljM8umwYjeKpL6_4rfylXNU4MKoYXswb0r7oTXhHncTqcL9W6fkSbSd9d1ZTEUQHlZRRfgaZ3jBvz0992W02BBx6V1YGT7HaOnFZrE-a8TctiNt3JhTwVsjcFopZdxPSvYSRHd6ZeiFnZ1__gmsgIS-sgtGqnUtpOKAvs-uz6KOynF7d_hII0pm45nmnVOCfKcOAT0Ujibc3NUJZY88T2rgKkl-cHa-PAMNa0sZ4m8BVLw4PMSqsGIUi3BIvzVqpIndovZ2hhDe0ClN_7TEJQZK4C1ZhTqfxyaR0HaLiCqzJO5f3oB5tJmPnv1Apj23upRN8oSEMzGO7b__2mTGwO1cpbvGvnEQJbUL5ieHuwuyb1Qtt6Vm0n388E56BUdACBy89CLLUoNJqFsCMbeR8RrU65MCF39_FVNj7nCdrfLduRhZDKvadM0tY_Pbwj9TkzRsFCu6xE9laoNH4vcw-1B4cvF6pYLDdJM8z0ZK1YNiOm1BHViyIhIM0DUSeCO-xZO_8wsftV2w8fKPCuZTws2DpyQ7UkJPslsT1vqR4ETgIgOUNL5I8HPdMJW7)

Fellow Patriot,

I faced one of the toughest Senate races in 2024. We were outraised, outspent, and up against the full force of the Left.

**They poured everything they had into Montana.**

But we still fought back. We won because grassroots supporters like you stepped up when it mattered most.

_**[Now, I need you to do it again.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=77ba8455aa774b3cb95bfd729315c31a&_e=j6TzbLMdn3Ef2LTUWeNfTvwCx0n4y_BJzT7G5CZeAqmGF0HjoZ-cLVDMqzjQz91gk8I309uvBFgZWTJl7jeQca6JDah0svCB_DoxyB2XtQjncJ8xO84WlAnModDJHSOQmbrfUljM8umwYjeKpL6_4rfylXNU4MKoYXswb0r7oTXhHncTqcL9W6fkSbSd9d1ZTEUQHlZRRfgaZ3jBvz0992W02BBx6V1YGT7HaOnFZrErx3qj0pbV0OM4vMZHVzTIn3LDCDzXi5UK0pwuAV_8RlCYUv3UL-OrC2uNo5O-kMOHoNUcy2KxOQholGSL_L06IckJ3bRIazZfwL7f6A8VAdwQ5KOGVzpyOJDFgcLNhekzFpJbaPodNbg7j1PRvqpVdT4t8EJpbutIf5V4IiYsP7ghDsol2Ya0Ou5QZRjViNC2-pip1jYiBsvdFAvBCw2RIvoOMfrdeyx86KGnIREtyf3tXwSNfesunxnmxGzZpeAheF6xu-FJ5gSkAt-fUml6h2WQCAcGtAayVm-lffirf6r3qxwox1bVxMeEQHjK6KjCBAdJX6tcOv89op5M9Vsur1BLcNAKj0B2xcPjy5tnS9zm7gu47urGE0zsbECRPcZMMMlNX_rRpXOnOKDK-AOi8ACTXSEYMDYiQ12sN3tJpBCrHq-x3jiexg1Mupw1__VYtCWvUdp9f3WsOzeq7oG-)**_

Kurt Alme is just entering this race, and that means he's starting from behind. The other side already has its network, its donors, and its attacks lined up.

Kurt doesn't have that luxury yet.

What he does have is a real Montana story, a record of service, and the kind of leadership we need in the Senate. **[But none of that matters if he doesn't have the resources to compete early.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=77ba8455aa774b3cb95bfd729315c31a&_e=j6TzbLMdn3Ef2LTUWeNfTvwCx0n4y_BJzT7G5CZeAqmGF0HjoZ-cLVDMqzjQz91gk8I309uvBFgZWTJl7jeQca6JDah0svCB_DoxyB2XtQjncJ8xO84WlAnModDJHSOQmbrfUljM8umwYjeKpL6_4rfylXNU4MKoYXswb0r7oTXhHncTqcL9W6fkSbSd9d1ZTEUQHlZRRfgaZ3jBvz0992W02BBx6V1YGT7HaOnFZrG73oyUZCV-vG2aenKgaZhlWdcw2SnJdJOW6tKbUNez8bkHKyJKvd_ADcD3vQklXgLlJTafTUvDp1dkoImhZR6YoViVVYxliRES-H846IxVK_pBDOlK4WKc0xJdNzWv1FVjmppCQtTZHw9XbO57c1Mmw5dTSIl4lHPMUDCmyxVlz2MT2S-5ajm0IfiYRX14xBxmy7RymxyYq5EbGkjhc3gRA3heaVL_L1SpCV9hMp5ljee1mZnvjZf2bS0tKgKV4iSExUO_gqXuWTx_kSbzhLHVJfB3Ni1MPmy_tb9aWtR2ZwztLjtPapN6C5b_BDvNoNgVVYKXDAG8tRjNas4B14PWoy0UA-sCFGdatHetpvFxJtWMM8VkY_LB5YWrlVBGKAlTLT7zlTqIkIga9CAdBndFUXbAmWAOTv3LqmO9OmkAoIEj8HLTxtkRTTlvY_gw8xbpYfKlnpQ71slpt3L-Viv5)**

I've seen firsthand how critical these early days are.

If Kurt is going to build a winning campaign - one that can stand up to the millions that will come flooding into this race - he needs a strong show of grassroots support right now.

Not later or when it's easy. Right now, _when it counts_.

**[Will you step up today and become one of Kurt Alme's first supporters?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=77ba8455aa774b3cb95bfd729315c31a&_e=j6TzbLMdn3Ef2LTUWeNfTvwCx0n4y_BJzT7G5CZeAqmGF0HjoZ-cLVDMqzjQz91gk8I309uvBFgZWTJl7jeQca6JDah0svCB_DoxyB2XtQjncJ8xO84WlAnModDJHSOQmbrfUljM8umwYjeKpL6_4rfylXNU4MKoYXswb0r7oTXhHncTqcL9W6fkSbSd9d1ZTEUQHlZRRfgaZ3jBvz0992W02BBx6V1YGT7HaOnFZrEGbBSeQwi4MXn5dzw1RY0RATQTIAICO6uRrFw96jtoh0uWyiMpB_xPiCXyB-Zwb0Oi7uUxzKO0s06izTWepYa7eTkZjyl1o_1KwtXWZ-VGXgUXEtzsmymWWuEWIMpF1kE83h-xfIaMoTXU2sb9HfvRyL8_mKwVC21i0DZYuREMooZU0U13D3SlZO8pozlfHihZ7ywFyqczXgnH3wvp-_0TBmNqpKx6OrdGK1AMIeFN5G0oFSoOAoCH70r37sjvjt1CY6fSdV5pirMzSPo2BiTWBGop2QLvVNuWBjjl0h60k7sw1aWql6chcm4qv3J1f7BxGwnTWzX5JBxmTWClSwg5ylUdwLdNv_TZOC-9ShDOjBHboSLMD8s5GmP6trFJdseYjSJZFzoEiZUg3-7xQpxhHYXIoiqz6CnomqBzGIdMHSWqRdp51z7mVqG1PbVvNuUg4b9UUBiDXcqMocf2iTIq)**

Your early contribution will help him build the foundation he needs to take on the Left, get his message out, and prove that Montana is not for sale.

We know what we're up against.

But I also know what's possible when people like you get involved early and refuse to back down.

**[Let's get Kurt off to a strong start.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=77ba8455aa774b3cb95bfd729315c31a&_e=j6TzbLMdn3Ef2LTUWeNfTvwCx0n4y_BJzT7G5CZeAqmGF0HjoZ-cLVDMqzjQz91gk8I309uvBFgZWTJl7jeQca6JDah0svCB_DoxyB2XtQjncJ8xO84WlAnModDJHSOQmbrfUljM8umwYjeKpL6_4rfylXNU4MKoYXswb0r7oTXhHncTqcL9W6fkSbSd9d1ZTEUQHlZRRfgaZ3jBvz0992W02BBx6V1YGT7HaOnFZrHbq1CNXWBi4tSOU8yR_fZgywJoim4_1odkT4JQ4mlzQc-stDaFq1FZFwmPJQAeLl_Q1QVE6KJiaNn4P7ZoMBz4Lsa7ZnshmVs0TL2-EBy_0O2sTjAsSg-Vqi4LFniP6i0jCo--EPwTKbOblZFcN60kKvz2ka0XTGlbUXXvl-tFr-7N8WLRTcCsQ8G4QjgRQto2BBvW3x425Eqx4SMXXrV2V8GvWV65JCWbTRL6hu_csYokzrSjKz2yTrfASP_4CHTDfG96oJmHhWQNCU50X3ePB3L0xEJ4LIIfHJqcDc-_DN54ElxzyKAhwII_mUomf_TwGSqXQ_EZydo3xjcknc3Ko-CyTBzs6O_xvl4UozLREKKEWaG5WVu2uR-A5VwejSxJ4OZ0_XA6VswOaS7qd9uqFl-G5sZPZ7bmfufBCDb2tOtYPv0MkPMpp7lT6U55X6s6ZcFderDJE72mFAxqFbJQ)**

clean_body: They tried to buy Montana in 2024. Now they want to flip it back. | Fellow Patriot, I faced one of the toughest Senate races in 2024. We were outraised, outspent, and up against the full force of the Left. They poured everything they had into Montana. But we still fought back. We won because grassroots supporters like you stepped up when it mattered most. - Kurt Alme is just entering this race, and that means he's starting from behind. The other side already has its network, its donors, and its attacks lined up. Kurt doesn't have that luxury yet. What he does have is a real Montana story, a record of service, and the kind of leadership we need in the Senate. I've seen firsthand how critical these early days are. If Kurt is going to build a winning campaign - one that can stand up to the millions that will come flooding into this race - he needs a strong show of grassroots support right now. Not later or when it's easy. Right now, when it counts. Your early contribution will help him build the foundation he needs to take on the Left, get his message out, and prove that Montana is not for sale. We know what we're up against. But I also know what's possible when people like you get involved early and refuse to back down. For Montana, Tim Sheehy FOLLOW KURT ALME ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Alme for Senate Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. body:
A government’s spending plan is one of the clearest expressions of its values.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129710002/615283330/1328794144?refcode=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkOWQwMWY0LTMzM2ItZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rQ2dLafLyVZE4YPMBFfHqhBQjoLA3V5VZQRKt2YSblg=&emci=e5bc0460-d039-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129710004/615283332/-1912693015?refcode=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkOWQwMWY0LTMzM2ItZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rQ2dLafLyVZE4YPMBFfHqhBQjoLA3V5VZQRKt2YSblg=&emci=e5bc0460-d039-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105) Friends, it’s Jane. A government’s spending plan is one of the clearest expressions of its values. It shows us, in black and white, who leaders are willing to protect and who they’re willing to sacrifice. **_Judging by his much-anticipated 2027 budget proposal, Trump and his Big Oil cronies are making plain that they see people and the planet as expendable._** We’ve proven before that when we show up and challenge the status quo, we can win. **[So I’m asking our most committed supporters: Will you take the pledge to vote in the 2026 midterms? It’s more important than ever that we make our voices heard and elect a firewall of climate champions to fight back.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129710006/615283334/-1912693015?refcode=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkOWQwMWY0LTMzM2ItZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rQ2dLafLyVZE4YPMBFfHqhBQjoLA3V5VZQRKt2YSblg=&emci=e5bc0460-d039-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)** | [I PLEDGE TO VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129710008/615283336/-1912693015?refcode=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkOWQwMWY0LTMzM2ItZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rQ2dLafLyVZE4YPMBFfHqhBQjoLA3V5VZQRKt2YSblg=&emci=e5bc0460-d039-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)
---
Here’s what Trump’s proposed budget would do:
→ EPA spending would be **cut in half.**
→ EPA grants would be **slashed by _$1 billion._**
→ The National Parks Service would lose about **2,920 full-time staff** and **72% of its construction budget,** among other cuts.
→ _All while**the defense budget would get a $1.5 trillion** increase._
I don’t know about you, but I’ve had enough of this administration ransacking our resources and devaluing human life.
**We need to stand together and show what _we_ value: each other. That’s what inspired me to create the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. I care too much about what the future looks like for our neighbors, our rainforests, our waters, and every living species to slow down.**
**[So we must send true leaders to Washington who'll put people over profits every single time. That starts with your pledge to vote in 2026. Once you sign the pledge, you’ll add Cresco to our supporter map, prove our movement is strong from coast to coast, and show Trump and his Big Oil cronies that their days in power are numbered.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129710010/615283338/-1912693015?refcode=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkOWQwMWY0LTMzM2ItZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rQ2dLafLyVZE4YPMBFfHqhBQjoLA3V5VZQRKt2YSblg=&emci=e5bc0460-d039-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=1d9d01f4-333b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)**

body:
| | | Hey there, it's Marc Elias.

Donald Trump can't stop interfering with our voting rights. From signing an Executive Order to gut mail‐in voting, to trying to steal an entire election, he's trying to subvert our sacred right to vote.

In November, we will face an inflection point: Either we allow a wannabe dictator to hold onto his unchecked power, or we elect a Democratic Senate to hold him accountable.

[**To make that second scenario happen, we'll need to work hard for it. Will you chip in $7 to the DSCC to help unseat Trump's cronies and take back the Senate majority? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/23030?amount=7&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260418-MarcElias-ElectionsandVotingRightsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260418-MarcElias-ElectionsandVotingRightsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=23519%2E9716520%2ERHrXP7)

He's unrelenting, but **he is beatable.** I would know; I've beaten him dozens of times in court.

But Trump isn't alone. Senate Republicans enable his every move and are even _supporting_ his voter suppression agenda.

**We can never allow them to trample on our right to vote,** and I'm grateful that the DSCC is on the front lines of the fight.

And they are the ONLY national committee solely dedicated to flipping the Senate, which we must do to stop Trump from stacking the courts or changing the laws to allow his abuses to continue. But this fight takes time and money.

[**The DSCC has set a $35,000 daily goal to make sure they're ready to take on Senate Republicans and their voter suppression agenda. And now's the time to step up. Please, before midnight, will you chip in $7 or more to beat Republicans and elect Democrats who will stand up for our voting rights? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/23030?amount=7&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260418-MarcElias-ElectionsandVotingRightsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260418-MarcElias-ElectionsandVotingRightsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=23519%2E9716520%2ERHrXP7)

clean_body: | | | Hey there, it's Marc Elias. Donald Trump can't stop interfering with our voting rights. From signing an Executive Order to gut mail‐in voting, to trying to steal an entire election, he's trying to subvert our sacred right to vote. In November, we will face an inflection point: Either we allow a wannabe dictator to hold onto his unchecked power, or we elect a Democratic Senate to hold him accountable. He's unrelenting, but he is beatable. I would know; I've beaten him dozens of times in court. But Trump isn't alone. Senate Republicans enable his every move and are even supporting his voter suppression agenda. We can never allow them to trample on our right to vote, and I'm grateful that the DSCC is on the front lines of the fight. And they are the ONLY national committee solely dedicated to flipping the Senate, which we must do to stop Trump from stacking the courts or changing the laws to allow his abuses to continue. But this fight takes time and money. We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | I'll do my part by beating Trump a 65th time in court ‐‐ Thanks, Marc Marc Elias | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Michael Bennet
subject: My favorite part of the job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129713650/615288629/-2054079050?refcode=jtk1243-fr-cu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU0Njg5YS0zNjNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn4E5B1cHETyJgbC1a_ChUTLVRLXCXgTbdfX2-YQj_E=)
---
**Friend, nothing beats traveling across Colorado. It's my favorite part of this campaign.**
Because if I'm going to be a governor who serves all Coloradans, I have to reach as many as I can. So every chance I get, I've been hitting the road to talk to folks about their families, jobs, priorities and dreams – and I want to spotlight some of those stops and conversations.
**_[But before I share some highlights from my campaign's "Our Colorado" statewide tour, will you chip in $5 or more to help keep my campaign for governor trucking along across the state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129713651/615288630/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1243-fr-cu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU0Njg5YS0zNjNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn4E5B1cHETyJgbC1a_ChUTLVRLXCXgTbdfX2-YQj_E=)_**
| | [DONATE TO FUEL MY
"OUR COLORADO" TOUR >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129713652/615288631/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1243-fr-cu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU0Njg5YS0zNjNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn4E5B1cHETyJgbC1a_ChUTLVRLXCXgTbdfX2-YQj_E=)
---
Recently, I spent a full day in Gunnison, where I joined a conversation about low basin snowpack and what it means for Colorado’s water supply:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129713653/615288632/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1243-fr-cu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU0Njg5YS0zNjNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn4E5B1cHETyJgbC1a_ChUTLVRLXCXgTbdfX2-YQj_E=)
That afternoon, I held another meeting alongside Commissioner Houck to organize folks on how we can best move our state forward:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129713654/615288633/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1243-fr-cu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU0Njg5YS0zNjNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn4E5B1cHETyJgbC1a_ChUTLVRLXCXgTbdfX2-YQj_E=)
I started the next day at a cafe in Salida, where I sat down with folks to discuss how we can protect Colorado from Trump's chaos and build an economy that works for working people:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129713655/615288634/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1243-fr-cu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU0Njg5YS0zNjNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn4E5B1cHETyJgbC1a_ChUTLVRLXCXgTbdfX2-YQj_E=)
Finally, we closed out this leg of the road trip in Alamosa – talking with students, discussing affordable housing and joining _The Valley_ podcast to share my vision for our state's future:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129713656/615288635/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1243-fr-cu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU0Njg5YS0zNjNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn4E5B1cHETyJgbC1a_ChUTLVRLXCXgTbdfX2-YQj_E=)

---

| Thing Three
---
... because "Our Colorado" isn't just a slogan.
It's a reminder that this state belongs to the people of Colorado – not the president or corrupt DC politicians. It's also a promise that our Colorado will not pay the price for Trump's chaos, and that it will be affordable again for working and middle-class families and attainable for the next generation.
**But this campaign runs on people power, so we're relying on folks like you to chip in $5, $25 or $100 to keep us going full steam ahead and get the word out to voters across all of Colorado's 64 counties.**
**_[So friend, before I hit the road again this week, will you help fuel my campaign to victory by chipping in $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129713659/615288638/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk1243-fr-cu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTU0Njg5YS0zNjNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mn4E5B1cHETyJgbC1a_ChUTLVRLXCXgTbdfX2-YQj_E=)_**

name: Dan Freeman
subject: Voting Rights Update, re: the DNC’s lawsuit
body:
---
| [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260418_6769_fr&refcode2=6769_22930333_hVHlOF&akid=6769%2E22930333%2EhVHlOF)
---
Derek, I’m writing today with an important update on the DNC’s work to protect voting rights. This is a longer email, so here’s the gist:
President Trump’s new executive order directs the federal government to build an eligible voter list for each state, so it can decide who gets to vote by mail — and instructs the US Postal Service not to return ballots for anyone not on this list. **We won’t let that happen, so we’re taking the Trump administration to court.**[**Please chip in using this link to help power our fight against Trump, in court, and on the ground.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260418_6769_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6769_22930333_hVHlOF&akid=6769%2E22930333%2EhVHlOF)
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260418_6769_fr&refcode2=6769_22930333_hVHlOF&akid=6769%2E22930333%2EhVHlOF)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260418_6769_fr&refcode2=6769_22930333_hVHlOF&akid=6769%2E22930333%2EhVHlOF)**
---
****
Now let’s get in the weeds:
President Trump’s executive order requires the Department of Homeland Security to compile lists in each state of the people it thinks are eligible to vote. Then it directs the US Postal Service not to carry mail ballots from anyone not on the list back to local election officials. If the list is out of date or inaccurate, you may be out of luck. **In the end, President Trump wants to pick and choose who can return a ballot by mail.**
But, Derek, President Trump doesn’t run American elections. The President has _no authority_ to set the rules for our democracy. Congress and the states have that power — no one else.
The Trump administration has tried to interfere with voting rights before, and we’ve beaten them time after time. We won’t let President Trump succeed in this desperate bid for power — and we won’t let him win the midterm elections either.
This case could fundamentally change voting rights in America, and the Trump administration is sure to take it all the way to the Supreme Court.
The DNC is taking on Republicans on all fronts — in the courts, on social media, and on the ground — to ensure that we elect Democrats who will stand up to these aspiring authoritarians. **And we need your help.**
[**If this work matters to you, please make a $7 contribution to the DNC today to help us continue bringing the fight to Trump and his allies. We will put your donation to work immediately.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2026?refcode=em_20260418_6769_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6769_22930333_hVHlOF&akid=6769%2E22930333%2EhVHlOF)

| | Friend, The goal for this election year is clear: if we want a Congress that actually delivers for Maryland families, we have to flip the House. Winning the majority doesn’t happen in Washington. It happens in our own backyards.**With only 50 days until the primary election, we’re hitting the pavement to talk to our neighbors about what’s at stake.** In March, our Doors for Democracy Tour campaign knocked over 2,000 doors across Maryland’s Third District, in partnership with our state and local partners, to connect with Democrats about the vision for our communities that we all share — lower costs, stronger schools, and more support for our working families. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129714670/615292239/908462267?referring_vol=7399538&share_context=dashboard-event-details&sharer_role=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDBmZDc0OS0zNzNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9tS092oUstDfn-IhHh-CyAzAWjXQz9Yq02FqIqOSOA=&emci=d3a3d215-0939-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=100fd749-373b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=30237190) [_**On May 9th, Team Elfreth is continuing our Doors for Democracy Tour and heading to Carroll County to knock on doors and connect with our neighbors, and I'd like you to join us.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129714676/615292245/908462267?referring_vol=7399538&share_context=dashboard-event-details&sharer_role=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDBmZDc0OS0zNzNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9tS092oUstDfn-IhHh-CyAzAWjXQz9Yq02FqIqOSOA=&emci=d3a3d215-0939-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=100fd749-373b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=30237190) | [Sign Up ➔](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129714682/615292251/908462267?referring_vol=7399538&share_context=dashboard-event-details&sharer_role=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDBmZDc0OS0zNzNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9tS092oUstDfn-IhHh-CyAzAWjXQz9Yq02FqIqOSOA=&emci=d3a3d215-0939-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=100fd749-373b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=30237190)

Knocking on doors is the most effective way to really move the needle for Marylanders. It’s how we learn what’s really on people’s minds — from the cost of groceries to health care access — and it’s how we build the grassroots movement we need to win back the majority.
We will be supporting [Megan Foelber](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129714691/615292260/-72108385?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDBmZDc0OS0zNzNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9tS092oUstDfn-IhHh-CyAzAWjXQz9Yq02FqIqOSOA=&emci=d3a3d215-0939-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=100fd749-373b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=30237190), Democrat for Carroll County Commissioner, District 5, as we rally our neighbors to knock doors and volunteer to flip Carroll County blue this cycle. In the Third District, Megan’s story is not an anomaly.**In 2025, Megan’s 17 years at the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) were abruptly ended by the Trump Administration’s DOGE cuts.** This experience reaffirmed her commitment to public service, which is why she bravely put her name on the ballot to represent her community as a Democrat on the all-Republican Board of Commissioners.
Now is the time to step up and help Megan and candidates like her. This November, we are building the momentum to flip seats from Congress to Boards of Commissioners and Education – all we have to do is show up! [_**Will you join us in Carroll County on May 9th?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129714699/615292269/908462267?referring_vol=7399538&share_context=dashboard-event-details&sharer_role=2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDBmZDc0OS0zNzNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9tS092oUstDfn-IhHh-CyAzAWjXQz9Yq02FqIqOSOA=&emci=d3a3d215-0939-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=100fd749-373b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=30237190)

Congresswoman Sarah Elfreth broke barriers in 2024, becoming the youngest woman ever elected to Congress from Maryland. She went to Congress with one thing in mind: delivering for Maryland families on the issues that matter most. Whether it's standing up for federal workers, supporting veterans, protecting the Chesapeake Bay, or tackling the affordability crisis head-on, Sarah is on the front lines, fighting for what is right. And Sarah has delivered on her promises. She has spent her first year in the House advocating for the Third District, successfully passing five bills into law, solving over 1,000 constituent cases, and bringing tens of millions in funding back to her community. She learned her work ethic and tenacity from growing up in a union household and honed her skills of problem-solving and collaborating over six years in the Maryland State Senate. Sarah lives in Annapolis with her fiancé, Eric, and their dog, Ollie. To learn more about Sarah, visit: [https://www.elfrethformaryland.com/ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129714745/615292323/-2051496126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDBmZDc0OS0zNzNiLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9tS092oUstDfn-IhHh-CyAzAWjXQz9Yq02FqIqOSOA=&emci=d3a3d215-0939-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=100fd749-373b-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=30237190) Emails like this are the most effective way to grow our campaign and reach supporters like you. # [Shut up, or Al Sharpton will call you racist ](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4720068&post_id=194551933&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk0NTUxOTMzLCJpYXQiOjE3NzY1MjQ5MDIsImV4cCI6MTc3OTExNjkwMiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ3MjAwNjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.o4_hith3CH8UrigomAAPeYwpJDo5RRBaaS0Uio-5N7g)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aad20a91-16b5-4fbe-be19-cddddf55fd29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
* * *
**Help us defeat the mainstream media, promote capitalism and American exceptionalism.**
**[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today:](https://substack.com/redirect/aad20a91-16b5-4fbe-be19-cddddf55fd29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Subscribe Here](https://substack.com/redirect/aad20a91-16b5-4fbe-be19-cddddf55fd29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
Recently the disgusting race baiter, **[tax cheat](https://substack.com/redirect/53bcc9ef-0c6a-4d19-a19d-5a7da317e89b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , and known liar Al Sharpton entertained several 2028 democrat presidential candidate wannabes at his "National Action Network" conference. One by one, they dutifully kissed the race ring parroting all the easy talking points: Trump racist, America racist, racism is racist, everything boils down to racism.
Eliminate racism and instant utopia, and so one by one the pandering candidates offered the empty promise of yet another government program to "tackle" and "stand up to" and "address" it.
Then, Al told his angry crowd that black people should not celebrate America's 250th Anniversary, and everyone cheered.
I loathe Al Sharpton.
That is more Christian and more elegant writing than "hate". I should not hate anyone as a Christian. Plus, writing "I hate so and so" reeks of a 12-year-old girl's diary. So, I wrote loathe.
But I have good reason to hate him.
* * *
* * *
**Sponsored by[Kalshi](https://substack.com/redirect/cef05884-f95a-4acb-be9b-f46e7cdfbd32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cef05884-f95a-4acb-be9b-f46e7cdfbd32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Must Be 21+. Gambling problem call 1-800-GAMBLER or 1-800-MY-RESET**
* * *
* * *
Anyone my age or older who grew up in New York has known Al for decades. His rise to fame happened in 1986 in the Howard Beach neighborhood in Queens, New York. In 1987, he perpetrated the Tawana Brawley hoax. In 1991 he whipped up enough racial violence in Crown Heights, Brooklyn that a mob killed a random Jewish man.
I could go into details on all three cases. I know them well, but there is no point as these moments are now fact, beyond scrutiny, and crucial to America's historical racial repository along with "Hands up don't shoot" and George Floyd. Truth is dangerous when fiction undergirds the racial agenda which gives people like Al raison d'etre.
The apocryphal depiction of the Howard Beach case is particularly humorous, especially for me because I grew up there. The made-for-TV movie depicted Queens as 1920's Alabama. Late one night three black kids with car trouble pulled over on an abandoned country road next to a weeping willow by a marsh.
"Golly gee whiz, daddy is sure right gonna be right angrier than a hornet in a tin can when he we get home," one of the kids said (more or less) as they began to walk down the dark road, the hum of bullfrog cries mixing with banjo music.
After several miles they saw in the distance the flickering porch light of a good ole southern pizzeria. The teens asked for aid, but a mob of racist Italians brutally assaulted them. One was chased onto the road where he was struck and killed by a passing car.
"Deliverance" met "The Sopranos".
Growing up in this neighborhood, I knew exactly where the car "broke down" and the pizzeria itself. It's still there. Been there since my parents would go in the 50's. It's got very good pizza. No pizzeria could survive in the hillbilly section of backwoods Italian Queens if it didn't have good pizza and apparently Meemaw's sweet tea.
The glaring problem. This is Queens. The miles they walked is only about half a mile and the desolate road has conservatively 500 stores, asses to elbows, on a jammed city street with a few hundred thousand residents, a million light bulbs, and incessant traffic at every hour of the day. What actually happened that night? It does not matter. The truth died long ago, and the narrative now lives in an unforgivable, un-editable past which funds people like Al.
Name any other national figure who demands every democrat prostate themselves before his agenda...
Al's agenda did irreparable harm to New York City. While Eddie Murphy was making "Coming to America" depicting Queens as yes, diverse, yes multiracial, yes, angry and vulgar and rough, it was not the race powder keg Al needed it to be. There's no money in harmony. There's no money in coexistence.
Racial tension is incredibly valuable... more like lucrative.
* * *
* * *
**Help us defeat the mainstream media, promote capitalism and American exceptionalism.**
**[Support The Capitalist, become a paid subscriber today:](https://substack.com/redirect/aad20a91-16b5-4fbe-be19-cddddf55fd29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Subscribe Here](https://substack.com/redirect/aad20a91-16b5-4fbe-be19-cddddf55fd29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
Al has been doing this consistently for decades. Trayvon Martin? Al Sharpton. Michael Brown? Al Sharpton. George Floyd must have been like spinning the big wheel on "The Price is Right" and landing on $1.
So, why in the world would Al of all people not celebrate America? America took a dumb, hate-filled, angry, basic man and turned him into a celebrity because he claims racism. America turned a blind eye to the millions he owes in back taxes because he claims racism. America gave him a TV show and a radio show when he is genuinely not smart because he claims racism.
As Jeff Bezos saw a market to sell books or Mark Zuckerberg saw a market to connect people online, Al saw a market for his product: perpetual, insurmountable racial grievance. Amazon needed to be created. So did Facebook. And Al would create his product, too.
Do not ask questions about his product, however. Just like you can't ask "why did those guys walk 10 blocks and pass hundreds of stores when they said they were just looking or a phone?" Shhh... this is racism, and the messy details which dismantle arguments do not help people like Al make money. He'll call you racist if you ask them. "If Michael Brown was standing 15 feet away with his hands up, how did his DNA get inside the officer's car?" Shhh... "If George Floyd was murdered why does the coroner's report state heart attack caused by an overdose and not asphyxiation?" Wow... now definitely shut up. There are monument and murals to St. George across the nation. He is beyond reproach, and if you don't believe that... racist.
Shut up, or Al calls you racist. Most people shut up and democrats kneel.
And what about black people? Don't ask. Don't ask race questions about culture or family. Don't ask race questions about Education. Crime. Welfare. No statistics. Demographics. No data. No discussion or dialogue or debate. Racism and anger.
And profit, of course.
I'm in my 5th decade of Al Sharpton. America is notably worse on race issues. Black America is worse across the board. The statistics around black America are so unfathomable that one struggles to comprehend them let alone accept them.
Al profits from them.
Poor America. Poor black America. Rich Al Sharpton.
The hell Al inflicted on NYC is the reason why I left at 18 and never returned. I am not indifferent to the plight of urban America or black America, but until the "No Kings" protesters turn their attention to those who genuinely enrich themselves off the misery and suffering of others, progress for them is impossible.
Poor America. Poor black America. Rich Al Sharpton.
God will have the final say.
**Honor and courage.**
* * *
* * *
_**Daniel Turner is the founder and executive director of Power The Future, a national nonprofit organization that advocates for American energy jobs. He also runs a sheep and cattle farm in rural Virginia. Contact him at daniel@powerthefuture.com and follow him on Twitter @DanielTurnerPTF**_

| | | | | | Team Mackenzie,As we gear up for the 2026 election, we’re keeping our foot on the gas and staying focused on winning big in November. Our message is clear: I’m **Delivering For Our Community.** That’s not just a slogan, it's a record of results. While the radical Democrats trying to defeat us are working to outflank each other from the far-left, I remain focused on **Delivering For Our Community** to help people. **This year, Americans have seen:**
* Tax relief for everyone, including tax cuts on tips and overtime, a bonus deduction for seniors, and relief for local businesses to help them grow and invest in our communities
* Swift action to crack down on cartels and secure the border
* Expanded access to childcare and paid family leave
* Stronger safeguards to ensure taxpayer dollars are protected

**Here at home, I’ve Deliveried for Our Community by:**
* $12 million returned to our constituents by cutting through federal red tape
* $60 million brought back to our community for local projects
* 6,000 constituent cases resolved involving federal agencies
* 160,000 constituent inquiries answered
* 1,000 community events and town halls attended

**It is this record that’s helping our campaign to grow even stronger!** This week, we launched our grassroots efforts with more than 50 dedicated volunteers joining us both in-person and virtually for our Campaign Grassroots Launch.#TeamMackenzie is energized and ready to hit the streets, knock on doors, and make the calls needed to secure a big win in November.Want to get involved? Join the team today:

That’s why I’ve been working since day one to lower costs for young families, raise wages for workers, improve housing affordability, and support economic growth initiatives that help create jobs. This coalition will help our campaign stay focused on the needs of young people across PA-7.**We’re ready to win and continue delivering for our community. Please join the team today!** Onward
Ryan Mackenzie
Congressman for PA-7

Our message is clear: I’m Delivering For Our Community. That’s not just a slogan, it's a record of results. While the radical Democrats trying to defeat us are working to outflank each other from the far-left, I remain focused on Delivering For Our Community to help people. This year, Americans have seen: Tax relief for everyone, including tax cuts on tips and overtime, a bonus deduction for seniors, and relief for local businesses to help them grow and invest in our communities Swift action to crack down on cartels and secure the border Expanded access to childcare and paid family leave Stronger safeguards to ensure taxpayer dollars are protected Here at home, I’ve Deliveried for Our Community by: $12 million returned to our constituents by cutting through federal red tape $60 million brought back to our community for local projects 6,000 constituent cases resolved involving federal agencies 160,000 constituent inquiries answered 1,000 community events and town halls attended It is this record that’s helping our campaign to grow even stronger! This week, we launched our grassroots efforts with more than 50 dedicated volunteers joining us both in-person and virtually for our Campaign Grassroots Launch.#TeamMackenzie is energized and ready to hit the streets, knock on doors, and make the calls needed to secure a big win in November.Want to get involved? Join the team today: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We also proudly launched the Gen Z for Mackenzie coalition: | | | | | | | | | | | | Supporting the needs of students and young people is a top priority for me. That’s why I’ve been working since day one to lower costs for young families, raise wages for workers, improve housing affordability, and support economic growth initiatives that help create jobs. This coalition will help our campaign stay focused on the needs of young people across PA-7.We’re ready to win and continue delivering for our community. Please join the team today! Onward Ryan Mackenzie Congressman for PA-7 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Mackenzie for Congress P.O.
